description_text: deskripsi pekerjaan : melaksanakan analisa laboratorium untuk sampel produksi (blending) dan permintaan khusus secara akurat serta tepat waktu. melakukan pengembangan dan optimasi formulasi lab blend sesuai spesifikasi produk. menjamin keakuratan, konsistensi, dan ketertelusuran data hasil analisa. mengidentifikasi penyimpangan serta melakukan investigasi awal (analisa penyebab). menjaga keandalan instrumen melalui perawatan rutin dan troubleshooting dasar. berkontribusi dalam program peningkatan berkelanjutan (continuous improvement) di laboratorium.  kualifikasi :   pendidikan minimal d3 kimia atau bidang terkait pengalaman 1 – 3 tahun di laboratorium (fresh graduate dipersilakan melamar) memahami spesifikasi material dan produk mampu mengoperasikan instrumen dan metode pengujian laboratorium memahami standar iso 17025 dan iso 9001:2015 mampu membaca dan memahami dokumen teknis berbahasa inggris menguasai penggunaan ms office (minimal excel) teliti, analitis, dan memiliki integritas tinggi mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan dan memenuhi target waktu bersedia ditempatkan di area cilegon - banten  nilai tambah:   pengalaman di industri pelumas / kimia familiar dengan sistem qc / qa pernah terlibat dalam audit laboratorium atau sistem kalibrasi  benefit/facility : bpjstk & bpjs kesehatan thr reimbursement medical bantuan makan ( catering )

description_text: role and responsibilities: tackle real industry challenges by applying analytics, machine learning, and optimization solutions to copper mining operations. use research and analytical expertise to test ideas, validate hypotheses, and uncover insights that drive resource-efficient mining. build and scale solutions in cloud environment to deliver clear, actionable insights for leadership and operations teams. design, implement, and maintain data-driven tools that solve complex business problems with advanced statistical and analytical methods. requirements: willingness to travel if required  (up to 30%, primarily to mining site) strong proficiency in english, both written and verbal. minimum bachelor’s degree in statistics, mathematics, engineering, physics, or a related field (more advanced degree is a plus). more than 3 years' experience  working as a data scientist is  mandatory . proficient in data analysis. hands-on expertise in predictive modeling (e.g., regression, random forest, gradient boosting), time series analysis, nlp, anomaly detection, or survival analysis. proficiency in python and its data science stack for data analysis, visualization, and modeling. solid knowledge of sql and experience with big-data platforms (snowflake experience is a plus). experience with cloud-based ml tools (azure a big plus). proven ability to mentor, collaborate, and grow a high-performing data science team. strategic thinker with a proven track record of transforming data into actionable insights that drive decision-making. why join us? we offer very  attractive salary  and  outstanding benefits. most of our clients are multinational company which you will be exposed to a large it environment and  valuable experience  in  international scale projects . you will  always learn new things  as our projects always adopt latest technology and best practice available in the market. last but not least, we offer a supportive and encouraging environment that puts the emphasis on teamwork. here,  your soft skill  (professional relationships, character, attitude)  will grow  as fast as your technical skill

description_text: deskripsi perusahaan  pt  waschen alora indonesia (alora group) adalah sebuah entitas induk perusahan yang memiliki core business di bidang jasa kebersihan, seperti: laundry rumah sakit (healtcare laundry), penyewaan linen rumah sakit (linen rental), laundry untuk perusahaan (corporate laundry), laundry retail (residence), jasa kebersihan rumah (home care) dan jasa kebersihan kantor (office care).  kami mengundang talenta terbaik yang memiliki dedikasi, berpikiran terbuka (growth mindset) dan loyalitas untuk pengembangan karir dan pengembangan bisnis demi kemajuan bersama di masa depan. kami tidak mencari sekadar analis data. kami mencari “arsitek pertumbuhan”, seseorang yang mampu mengubah data menjadi strategi, dan strategi menjadi dampak nyata.  kami mencari “problem solver berbasis data”, seseorang yang mampu melihat pola di balik angka, memahami bisnis secara mendalam, dan mengubah insight menjadi keputusan strategis. di peran ini, anda akan berada di jantung pengambilan keputusan memahami apa yang benar-benar bekerja, apa yang tidak, dan ke mana kita harus melangkah berikutnya. tanggung jawab (job description) turn data into strategic insight melakukan analisis data dan riset pasar untuk memahami tren industri, kebutuhan pelanggan, posisi kompetitif perusahaan serta peluang dan area yang perlu ditingkatkan dalam operasional bisnis. melakukan riset dan analisis mendalam (in-depth analysis) terhadap customer, marketing metrics, competitor landscape, serta tren marketing terbaru untuk mengidentifikasi peluang dan menutup gap pada produk maupun funnel. menggali data operasional, data pelanggan, data pasar untuk menemukan pola, peluang, dan risiko yang tidak terlihat oleh orang lain.  drive decision-making menyajikan insight yang tajam dan relevan untuk membantu manajemen mengambil keputusan berbasis data, bukan asumsi. bertanggung jawab atas fungsi analitik dengan merancang strategi pelacakan (tracking), membangun kerangka pengukuran (measurement framework), serta memberikan insight yang jelas terkait aktivitas operasional dan marketing. berkolaborasi dengan tim lintas fungsi untuk memberikan insight yang mendukung pengambilan keputusan strategis. solve real business problems mengidentifikasi bottleneck, inefficiency, dan peluang growth dalam proses bisnis, lalu memberikan solusi yang actionable. mendukung pelaksanaan a/b testing dan desain eksperimen, memastikan setiap project dapat diukur dengan baik dan hasilnya valid secara statistik.  build data-driven system mengembangkan dashboard, model analitik, dan framework pengukuran yang menjadi fondasi pengambilan keputusan perusahaan. collaborate across functions bekerja lintas tim (operations, marketing, finance, product) untuk memastikan setiap strategi didukung oleh data yang solid. kualifikasi (requirements) pendidikan minimal diploma/sarjana di bidang terkait (relevan). memiliki pengalaman bekerja minimal 1 s.d. 5 tahun dibidang data analyst dan business analyst (lebih diutamakan yang menguasai market research dan marketing analysis). mampu berpikir kritis dan sistematis serta mampu menghubungkan data dengan konteks bisnis. pengalaman dalam menggunakan alat analisis data (google analytics, power bi, sql, python dan tools sejenisnya), termasuk kemampuan mengolah big data secara efisien. berpengalaman membuat dashboard menggunakan tools visualisasi data (metabase, tableau, looker, power bi atau sejenisnya). memahami berbagai channel digital marketing (iklan berbayar, seo, referral, pertumbuhan organik, kampanye crm). memahami statistik, analisis tren, dan machine learning dasar. kemampuan untuk bekerja dengan data besar dan kompleks.  berpikir analitis, detail-oriented, serta mampu menyajikan data secara logis. komunikatif & kolaboratif, bisa bekerja sama dengan tim marketing, sales, dan operasional. lancar berbahasa inggris. kompensani dan benefit gaji dan tunjangan yang kompetitif dengan insentif (bonus) kinerja. bpjs (asuransi kesehatan). exposure langsung ke decision-making level. lingkungan kerja yang mendorong thinking, ownership, dan impact. kesempatan berkembang menjadi future description_text: kinobi ai  is a singapore-based company dedicated to transforming higher education by helping universities go beyond just academics. we focus on holistic student success, leveraging ai-powered solutions to ensure that students are well-prepared for their careers. we're looking for individuals who share our vision and want to make a meaningful impact in the future of education. our purpose is to: empower institutions to guide their beneficiaries toward meaningful employment opportunities through ai-driven solutions demonstrate to the world that a global ai-powered b2b saas enterprise can be successfully built from southeast asia about the role as a  business analyst , you will play a key role in designing and shaping end-to-end saas solutions for kinobi’s clients. this role bridges business requirements and technical execution — ensuring proposed solutions are commercially viable, functionally clear, and technically feasible. you will work closely with sales, product, engineering, and implementation teams across pre-sales and early delivery phases. while grounded in strong business analysis fundamentals, this role also involves contributing to high-level solution architecture and supporting technical solution decisions. this position is ideal for candidates with business analyst, pre-sales, or technical consulting backgrounds who want to deepen their exposure to solution architecture in a saas environment. responsibilities solution architecture & technical ownership design and define high-level solution architectures, including system components, integrations, data flows, and deployment models. gather, analyze, and validate client business, functional, and technical requirements, including non-functional requirements such as scalability, security, performance, and reliability. assess technical feasibility, risks, and constraints of proposed solutions, and recommend architectural approaches and mitigation strategies. act as the technical authority during pre-sales and solutioning, ensuring solutions align with product capabilities and implementation realities. functional solutioning & delivery readiness translate solution architectures into clear functional scopes, assumptions, and constraints to support smooth handover from pre-sales to implementation guide proof-of-concepts (pocs) and demos, ensuring functional workflows and technical designs accurately reflect real-world use cases. collaborate closely with product managers and implementation teams to ensure solutions are deliverable, scalable, and operationally sound. support audit and compliance requirements (e.g., iso 27001, imda) by aligning solution designs with required security and regulatory standards. commercial & operational support support proposal development and rfp responses by contributing architectural inputs, functional solution narratives, and technical justifications. maintain clear and structured solution documentation to support internal alignment and execution. provide insights and feedback to improve solution effectiveness, proposal success, and client satisfaction. conduct structured follow-ups and engagements with potential clients to clarify business, functional, and technical requirements, validate solution assumptions, and refine solution scope throughout the pre-sales and solutioning process. requirements 1-3 years of experience in saas, solution architecture, pre-sales engineering, technical consulting, or solution-focused roles. strong understanding of saas platforms, system architecture concepts, and integration patterns. experience gathering and translating business, functional, and technical requirements into viable solution designs. ability to reason about non-functional requirements such as scalability, security, performance, and reliability. comfortable balancing technical design with functional and operational considerations. strong english  communication skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders. comfortable working closely with cross-functional teams (sales, product, implementation). highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple solution streams in parallel. familiarity with ai-enabled solutions, data platforms, or process automation is a plus. exposure to rfps, client-facing solutioning, or enterprise delivery environments preferred. self-driven, proactive, and motivated to grow in both technical depth and operational impact. why join us? work on a meaningful ai-powered product that’s transforming the future of education and impacting millions of students across southeast asia and beyond. be part of a fast-growing company with founders who deeply care about your professional and personal growth — and who are committed to building with purpose and intelligence. get ownership and flexibility to shape how the tech + ai team grows and scales — from roadmap to architectural decisions. additional information: all interviews and communication will be conducted in english. only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

description_text: specific responsibilities include:  analyze data using statistical software (e.g., python, r)  extract and aggregate data from large sets using sql, hive, spark and other tools  powerpoint skills what will also help: • preferred to have a consulting background, whether working in a consulting company or having similar experience orchestrating complex solutions based on various stakeholders' input and current state understanding. • strong understanding of payments and/or banking industry including consumer credit, consumer debit, small business, commercial, co-brand and merchant • strong hold on ms excel and powerpoint • strong commercial acumen, with experience in working on business/value cases that prove roi

description_text: tanggung jawab utama merancang visualisasi: membangun dan memelihara dasbor interaktif di looker studio untuk menerjemahkan data menjadi wawasan bisnis. merekayasa aliran data: mengoptimalkan query sql di bigquery untuk mengubah data mentah menjadi model siap analisis. analisis terprogram: menggunakan python (pandas/numpy) untuk pembersihan data, otomatisasi, dan analisis statistik tingkat lanjut. kolaborasi & versioning: menggunakan git untuk kontrol versi, branching, dan peer review bersama tim. persyaratan teknis penguasaan sql: ahli dalam bigquery sql, termasuk window functions, cte, partitioning, dan clustering. keahlian bi: berpengalaman dengan business intelligence (khususnya looker studio), termasuk data blending dan calculated fields. kemahiran python: andal menggunakan python untuk manipulasi data dan otomatisasi alur kerja. pemodelan data: paham prinsip star schema dan denormalisasi untuk optimasi kinerja bi. kefasihan git: terbiasa dengan alur kerja branching, merging, dan pull requests. pola pikir analitis & logika bisnis penyusunan kpi: mampu mendefinisikan dan membangun metrik untuk produk, rantai pasok, dan perilaku pelanggan. literasi statistik: mampu membedakan sinyal dan noise, serta familier dengan uji hipotesis dan analisis tren. logika spasial & fuzzy: berpengalaman menangani inkonsistensi data menggunakan algoritma string similarity atau fungsi geospasial.
requirements: Bi, Bigquery, Blending, Business Intelligence, Calculated Fields, Clustering, Functions, Looker, Model, Numpy, Partitioning, Peer Review, Pull Requests, Python Pandas, Query, SQL, Star Schema, String, Studio, Versioning, Window

description_text: "punya minat terhadap analisis data?" "suka pekerjaan yang membutuhkan ketelitian, problem-solving, dan berpikir kritis?" anda berkesempatan untuk bergabung bersama kami sebagai sales data analyst di pt superior porcelain sukses. posisi ini cocok bagi anda yang teliti, disiplin, dan mahir dalam excel, serta memiliki ketertarikan dalam pengolahan data. pada posisi ini anda akan bertanggung jawab dalam hal-hal berikut: mengumpulkan, mengolah, dan menganalisis data penjualan dari berbagai sumber untuk mengidentifikasi tren, peluang, dan area perbaikan. membuat laporan dan visualisasi data yang komprehensif untuk menyajikan wawasan yang dapat diambil tindakan kepada tim penjualan dan manajemen. berkolaborasi dengan tim penjualan untuk mendukung strategi bisnis perusahaan. kualifikasi: d4/s1 segala jurusan statistika/teknik/matematika/data analytics, ipk min. 3.00. fresh graduate dipersilahkan melamar. memiliki kemampuan analisa yang baik dan menyukai pekerjaan yang berkaitan dengan data mahir menggunakan rumus-rumus excel (pivot, hlookup, vlookup, dll). teliti, ulet, dan disiplin penempatan di daerah kelapa gading (jakarta utara) / surabaya (jawa timur)  *pilih salah satu .

description_text: job summary we are looking for a highly analytical, agile, and detail-oriented data analyst to join our livestream team. this role is crucial in transforming raw data from every live session into actionable insights that drive gross merchandise value (gmv), optimize viewer engagement, and empower the production team and hosts to make data-driven decisions. responsibilities daily performance analysis  : monitor and analyze key metrics from livestream sessions in real-time and post-live including traffic, watch time, click through rate (ctr), conversion rate (cr), gmv, etc content & product optimization  : collaborate closely with livestream trainer to evaluate top-selling products, identify high-retention segments, and provide data-backed recommendations for product bundling and flash sales dashboard development & reporting  : design, build, and maintain interactive daily and weekly reporting dashboards for the operational team using advanced spreadsheets, tableau, power bi, or looker audience profiling  : analyze audience demographics, purchasing behavior, and interaction patterns to determine optimal broadcasting schedules (peak hours) a/b testing & experimentation  : design and measure the outcomes of livestream experiments, such as testing different thumbnail designs, stream titles, or host promotional styles. market research  : monitor competitor and platform livestreaming trends (tiktok shop, shopee live, etc) requirements bachelor’s degree in computer science/statistics/information systems or a related quantitative field experience: 2-3 years of proven experience as data analyst. background in e-commerce, digital marketing or an mcn (multi-channel network) is a strong plus. highly proficient in spreadsheets/excel (comfortable with complex formulas, pivot tables, and large dataset manipulation). strong knowledge of sql for database extraction and querying. hands-on experience with data visualization tools (e.g., tableau, power bi, google looker studio). excellent communication skills; ability to translate complex quantitative data into clear, actionable terms for creative teams and hosts. ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and adapt quickly to dynamic platform trends. strong business acumen to understand how data metrics directly impact revenue goals.

description_text: role purpose this role exists to  turn high-volume order-receiving data into meaningful insights . you will analyze thousands of incoming order records to identify patterns, risks, and performance drivers related to order accuracy, timing, channels, and data quality—supporting better decisions at the front end of the order lifecycle. this is a  pure analytics role , not an order entry or processing position. job scope analyze  large datasets of incoming orders  across multiple channels (sales, distributors, digital, edi, etc.). identify trends, patterns, anomalies, and root causes related to order errors, duplicates, delays, and data inconsistencies into actionable strategies build and maintain  analytical dashboards and insight reports  for order-receiving performance. translate complex datasets into  clear insights and narratives  for operations, sales, and management to drive business. develop  data-driven recommendations  to address issues, improve efficiency, and optimize order intake. perform deep-dive analysis on order quality, demand signals, and customer behavior. ensure  data accuracy, consistency, and integrity  in all analytical outputs. continuously refine kpis and analytical frameworks for order-receiving performance. requirements bachelor’s degree in data analytics, statistics, mathematics, engineering, or related fields. 3+ years experience in data analytics, preferably in sales operations or order management environments. strong skills in  excel, sql , and bi tools (power bi, tableau, etc.). proven experience handling  high-volume transactional data . strong analytical thinking and data storytelling skills.

description_text: responsibilities: - responsible for evaluating the credit worthiness of new credit applicants and monitoring the ongoing financial performance of existing credit customers. - overseeing & executing the end to end process of model training, including data preparation, feature analysis, parameter tuning, and model evaluation, to ensure the accurate and effective credit score. - generate & implement new features by thorough analysis, aimed at enhancing model auc. - responsible as pic of modelling part for responding to regulator or partner in relates with audit or part of partnership cooperation. - study business operations and the local market to make determinations about its ongoing competitive outlook. - ensure compliance to all policies and standards and ensure full audit readiness at all times. requirements: - minimum 2 years of experience in credit risk analysis. more experienced candidates may be considered for lead positions. - bachelor degree and above in finance, computer science, statistics, economics, or other relevant fields. - excellent analytical thinking and solid experience in data management. - comfortable with ambiguity and yet able to steer analytics projects toward clear business goals, testable hypotheses and action-oriented outcomes. - working experience in retail/institutional banking, consumer/sme finance, supply chain finance, e-commerce, consulting or credit ratings agency will be an advantage - proficiency in sql or/and python is a must - english oral communication is a must. - mandarin ability is a plus.

description_text: excelitas® is a leading provider of advanced, life-enriching technologies that make a difference, serving global market leaders in the life sciences, advanced industrial, next-generation semiconductor and avionics end markets. headquartered in pittsburgh, pa, usa, excelitas is an essential partner in the design, development and manufacture of advanced technologies, offering leading-edge innovation in sensing, detection, imaging, optics and specialty illumination for customers worldwide. excelitas is at the forefront of addressing many of the relevant megatrends impacting the world today, including precision medicine, industrial automation, artificial intelligence, and connected devices (iot). our facility in batam, indonesia specializes in the production of lighting and detection product technologies including our specialty lamps for industrial and photonics applications, ipl lamps and trigger coils, as well as infra-red detectors (ird), sensor modules and pyro-electric ceramic wafers. operating since september 1994, this site is also responsible for manufacturing of our thermopile sensors (tps), thermopile modules (tpm), ccd sensors and printed circuit board assemblies. we are presently seeking a  test development engineer  who will be responsible to develop, sustain and improve process of production in his/her designated area, creates process documentation, and solve process issues by using process engineering skills. key responsibilities: develop new test systems using advanced technologies to meet product and customer requirements. improve and optimize existing testers to achieve faster, more stable, and efficient performance. perform failure analysis to ensure product quality and troubleshoot tester/equipment issues to support smooth production operations. evaluate, verify, and provide technical support to r&d, npi, and qa, especially in areas related to testability and result validation. prepare and maintain tester documentation, including test reports, buyoff documents, grr, and msa evaluations. qualify new or relocated equipment and validate testing processes used in manufacturing; analyze results and prepare qualification reports. drive process improvements to enhance efficiency in test operations and monitor testing yields using statistical techniques. provide training, guidance, and technical support to test operators and technicians. monitor and control tester performance through data analysis to prevent quality issues and reduce downtime. ensure compliance with all procedures related to quality, environmental, health, and safety (qehs) management systems within the work area. comply with procedure related with quality, environment, health, and safety management system in respective area in-charge. requirements: ·       bachelor’s degree (s1/d4) in electronics engineering, physics engineering, or instrumentation. ·       proficient in programming languages such as c#, c++, sql, and html. ·       strong understanding of data acquisition systems (visa, gpib, rs232) and basic image processing. ·       experience in tester development, embedded systems, and conduct failure analysis. ·       solid knowledge of electronic fundamentals and hands‑on experience using laboratory equipment (oscilloscope, function generator, lux meter, etc.). ·       ability to learn and understand new-generation products and technologies. ·       capable of resolving technical and quality issues related to test programs, including proper documentation and coordination with stakeholders. ·       fluent in spoken and written english.
requirements: Addressing, Applications, Artificial Intelligence, Basic, Board, C, C++, Charge, Circuit, Compliance, Connected, Coordination, Creates, Customer, Customers, Data Acquisition, Data Analysis, Development, Devices, Documentation, Documents, Edge, Efficiency, Electronic, Electronics, Embedded Systems, Engineer, Engineering, English, Enhance, Equipment, Evaluate, Evaluations, Failure Analysis, Function, Global Market, Guidance, Health And Safety, Html, Image Processing, Imaging, Improvements, Industrial Automation, Innovation, Instrumentation, Issues, Laboratory, Lighting, Management System, Manufacture, Manufacturing, Markets, Modules, Operators, Optics, Optimize, Oscilloscope, Partner, Performance, Physics, Precision, Procedure, Procedures, Product Quality, Production Operations, Programming Languages, Provider, Pyro, Qa, Qualification, R D, Reduce, Resolving, SQL, Safety Management, Semiconductor, Sensors, Serving, Stable, Stakeholders, Statistical Techniques, Technicians, Technologies, Test Programs, Tester, Testing Processes, Trigger, Validation, Verify, Visa

description_text: peluang menarik di pt serebrum pt serebrum , sebuah perusahaan baru teknologi di indonesia, sedang mencari talenta terbaik untuk bergabung dengan kami sebagai full-stack ai engineer. dalam peran ini, anda akan bertanggung jawab membangun aplikasi berbasis ai secara end‑to‑end. tugas ini mencakup perancangan arsitektur dan integrasi model ai, pengembangan sistem backend yang andal, serta pembuatan antarmuka pengguna (ui) yang intuitif untuk berinteraksi dengan fitur ai. tanggung jawab anda ai integration: mengintegrasikan model ai (melalui api seperti openai/anthropic atau model open‑source via hugging face) ke dalam aplikasi. backend development: membangun api yang robust, mengelola database (sql/nosql), serta menggunakan vector databases (misalnya chromadb, pinecone) untuk kebutuhan rag (retrieval‑augmented generation). frontend development: mengembangkan dashboard atau interface yang responsif dan ramah pengguna agar interaksi dengan fitur ai berjalan lancar. optimization: melakukan prompt engineering, fine‑tuning ringan, serta optimasi performa dan latensi pada sisi backend maupun frontend. kualifikasi yang kami cari gelar sarjana atau setara dalam ilmu komputer, teknik informatika, atau bidang terkait minimal 2 tahun pengalaman sebagai full-stack developer atau ai engineer bahasa pemrograman: python (untuk ai/backend) dan javascript/typescript (untuk frontend). framework ai: pengalaman dengan langchain, llamaindex, atau crewai. pengetahuan dasar pytorch/tensorflow menjadi nilai tambah. backend: familiar dengan framework seperti fastapi, flask, atau node.js. frontend: menguasai library modern seperti react.js serta styling dengan tailwind css. data storage: memahami database relasional (postgresql) dan vector database. tools: docker, git, serta layanan cloud (aws/gcp/azure). kemampuan problem‑solving yang baik. rasa ingin tahu dan kemampuan riset mandiri untuk memahami bagaimana fitur ai dapat memberikan nilai bagi pengguna. keuntungan bekerja di pt serebrum gaji kompetitif dan tunjangan menarik bpjs kesehatan & ketenagakerjaan lingkungan kerja yang kolaboratif dan mendukung inovasi kesempatan untuk terlibat dalam proyek-proyek teknologi terkini tentang pt serebrum pt serebrum adalah startup teknologi inovatif yang berfokus pada pengembangan ekosistem solusi it cerdas. mengambil inspirasi dari cerebrum—pusat integrasi fungsi intelektual manusia—kami hadir untuk menjadi "otak" penggerak transformasi digital bagi bisnis dan masyarakat. kami percaya bahwa teknologi bukan sekadar alat bantu, melainkan mitra strategis. pt serebrum berkomitmen untuk menjembatani kesenjangan antara kompleksitas data dengan kebutuhan praktis industri melalui pemanfaatan artificial intelligence (ai) dan rekayasa perangkat lunak yang presisi tertarik untuk bergabung dengan tim kami?  lamar sekarang  dan jadilah bagian dari perjalanan transformasi digital kami!

description_text: company description viahart was founded in 2010. we are an innovative consumer products company. we design, manufacture, and distribute consumer products ranging from educational toys & sporting goods to cell phone & ai-powered electronic accessories. we also offer innovative logistics and manufacturing services. because we sell worldwide and make our products in different countries (not just china), we’ve built a base to navigate tariffs and changes in global trade. the company is not owned by private equity and the owners, employees, and their families use the products we make. our business has been featured in the wall street journal, on television (cnbc and nbc), and in the new york times. learn more about our company at https://viahart.com/ job responsibilities forecasting sales and inventory for purchasing optimizing our inventory across multiple locations monitoring our sales vs. forecasts and seasonality patterns determining the root cause of inventory discrepancies pricing our products in the us, for retail stores, and for international sales checking the algorithms, calculations, and logic of our in-house custom built software (spreadsheet formulas required, programming is not) commenting and explaining any (spreadsheet) code or algorithms you write monitoring the profitability of our products simplifying the logic in our software both in our spreadsheets and with our developer building data dashboards logging data using data to determine causality and identify issues that need our attention updating process documents (sop) so others know how to use the analysis and systems you have built skills required clear written and verbal english communication strong mathematical skills proficiency with spreadsheet formulas (google sheets, excel) ability to understand the logic of software systems (coding not required, except for formulas) ability to use ai tools effectively, using reasoning and strong verification skills love numbers and be able to identify the relationship between them and what is happening the real world high attention of detail and strong sense of responsibility for the quality of your work self-motivated and able to work independently location you may start remote and then transition to an in-office position in sudirman business district (indonesia), 5 days a week you must be able to join our semi-weekly 9 am texas time meeting when needed. (9pm indonesia time) (no longer than 30 minutes) work commitment and availability required. this is a full-time position requiring a minimum of 40 hours a week of good work! this position is not compatible with activities or commitments that limit daily availability. candidates must be able to work consistently during agreed working hours and be available during the workday. if you cannot commit to a full-time schedule, this role will not be a fit for you. compensation and benefits you will be paid in usd ($1,940 to $2,531usd a month) yearly bonus: performance-based bonuses are reviewed early february, typically ranging from 0% to 15% of annual salary. we offer 16 business days of paid vacation anually. we replaced public holidays with extra paid time off allowing you to choose when you take time off rather than following a calendar!  we may conduct reference checks as part of our hiring process to ensure we bring on honest, hardworking, and capable people.

job_title: Principal Product Manager - Discovery and Personalisation
description_text: the principal product manager for discovery & personalisation will own how subscribers find, explore and return to the economist's journalism across web and app. this is a senior, cross-cutting role spanning two closely related disciplines: discovery . owning the on-platform representation of our content - search, navigation, browse patterns and conversational interfaces that allow users to interrogate the archive and find authoritative journalism efficiently. this includes keyword and semantic search, ranking and surfacing logic, and generative ai features such as q&a, content summarisation and conversational discovery experiences. a key part of this work is establishing the evaluation frameworks and human-in-the-loop processes that ensure ai-powered features are grounded in user trust and consistent with our editorial brand.        personalisation.  owning the recommendation and ranking algorithms that drive browse-led experiences — helping subscribers decide what to read, watch or listen to next. this means defining the behavioural signals and contextual inputs that feed personalisation models, partnering with data science on model development and evaluation, and ensuring our systems support habit formation without narrowing editorial perspective.  the role interfaces with web, app, data science, editorial and analytics teams. responsibilities own the vision and roadmap for discovery & personalisation across web and app. lead the evolution of keyword and semantic search, including relevance, ranking and result quality. own browse-led personalisation systems — defining the signals, models and decisioning logic that surface relevant, timely content for individual subscribers. lead the creation of generative ai features including q&a, content summarisation, explainer and conversational discovery experiences that help users explore and connect our journalism. establish robust evaluation frameworks and human-in-the-loop processes to ensure ai-powered features are accurate, transparent and aligned with our editorial values. partner closely with data science on the definition, evaluation and iteration of ranking and recommendation models. maintain strong judgement around responsible, transparent and editorially-aligned personalisation — preserving journalistic breadth and integrity. work closely with editorial to ensure discovery and personalisation reflect journalistic judgement and trust, and that the right feedback loops are in place. collaborate with web and app teams to ensure consistent, high-quality implementation of discovery and personalisation experiences across platforms. define and track success metrics related to findability, relevance, engagement, habit formation and trust. communicate strategy, priorities and performance clearly to senior stakeholders across product, editorial and technology. the ideal skills for this role are: builder: you have owned and shipped complex search, discovery, recommendation or personalisation systems in content-rich or subscription products. ai-fluent: you have hands-on experience defining and evaluating generative ai features — you understand the product, trust and editorial considerations that make ai experiences succeed or fail. data-informed: comfortable working with data scientists on ml-driven systems, evaluation frameworks and experimentation. product-led: strong judgement in defining strategy, translating it into roadmaps, and delivering outcomes through cross-functional teams in lean environments. editorially-aware: confident balancing user intent, algorithmic optimisation and editorial integrity. communicator: able to explain complex systems and trade-offs clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences. collaborative: comfortable learning, iterating and working across disciplines — engineering, data science, design and editorial — in a fast-moving environment. domain knowledge search and discovery systems, including semantic retrieval, ranking and evaluation. personalisation systems, behavioral signals and experimentation. generative ai product development and conversational interface best practices. responsible ai, algorithmic transparency and human-in-the-loop design. metrics for discovery quality, relevance, user understanding and trust. subscription or habit-forming digital products. multi-format digital content environments. enthusiasm for the economist's mission, journalism and global audience.
requirements: AI, Algorithms, Analytics, Balancing, Behavioral, Best Practices, Brand, Builder, Collaborative, Communicate, Communicator, Complex Systems, Confident, Connect, Content Search, Creation, Cross Functional, Cross Functional Teams, Cutting, Data Science, Define, Defining, Definition, Delivering, Digital Content, Digital Products, Discovery, Domain, Editorial, Efficiently, Engagement, Engineering, Establishing, Evaluating, Experimentation, Features, Feedback, Format, Frameworks, Functional Teams, Global, Help, High Quality, Ideal, Implementation, In Place, Interface, Interfaces, Iteration, Journalism, Judgement, Lean, Learning, Logic, Loops, ML, Mission, Model Development, Models, Moving, Navigation, Outcomes, Partner, Partnering, Patterns, Performance, Platform, Platforms, Priorities, Processes, Product Development, Product Manager, Q A, Ranking, Recommendation, Retrieval, Return, Roadmap, Roadmaps, Semantic, Stakeholders, Strategy, Subscription, Success Metrics, Systems Evaluation, Technical And Non Technical Audiences, Technology, Timely, Translating, Transparency, Trust, Values, Vision, Web App

description_text:
deskripsi pekerjaan
  key responsibilities 
 pipeline development: design, develop, and maintain robust etl/elt (extract, transform, load) pipelines to move data from operational databases and external apis into our data warehouse. 
 data modeling: architect scalable data models (star schema, snowflake, data vault) to ensure high performance and ease of use for end-users. 
 infrastructure management: manage cloud-based data environments (aws, gcp, or azure) and orchestrate workflows using tools like apache airflow or prefect. 
 data quality & governance: implement automated testing and monitoring to ensure data integrity, security, and compliance with privacy regulations (gdpr/ccpa). 
 collaboration: partner with data scientists to prepare "feature stores" and with business intelligence (bi) analysts to optimize query performance. 
 
 required qualifications 
 bachelor’s degree in computer science, information technology, or related field 
 proven experience as a data engineer or similar role 
 strong proficiency in sql and database management (e.g., postgresql, mysql) 
 experience with programming languages such as python, java, or scala 
 hands-on experience with etl tools and data pipeline frameworks 
 familiarity with cloud platforms (e.g., aws, gcp, or azure) 
 understanding of data warehousing concepts and modeling (e.g., star/snowflake schema) 
 
 preferred qualifications 
 experience with big data technologies (e.g., apache spark, hadoop) 
 knowledge of workflow orchestration tools (e.g., airflow) 
 familiarity with containerization (docker, kubernetes) 
 experience with streaming data (e.g., kafka) 
 understanding of data security and compliance standards

job_title: CRM and Supply Chain Data Scientist
description_text: kualifikasi: pendidikan minimal s1 matematika, s1 statistika, computer science & engineering, teknik industri dan ekonomi. pengalaman minimal 1 tahun di transformasi data, digitilisasi data dan integrasi data. memiliki pengalaman di bidang crm, loyalty, ntegrasi data, atau supply chain.   terbiasa mengolah data menggunakan excel, sql, dan/atau python / r.             mampu membersihkan dan mengolah data yang belum rapi.             bisa menjelaskan hasil analisis dengan bahasa yang mudah dipahami dan dapat menggunakan power bi / tableau / looker. memiliki pola pikir yang fokus pada inisiatif dan solusi.             bersedia ditempatkan di unit usaha yang berlokasi di sungai guntung, indragiri hilir.            deskripsi pekerjaan: mengolah dan menganalisis data supply chain end-to-end, data loyalty dan program crm yang berjalan.         menganalisis perilaku member (aktif, tidak aktif, retention, churn).             mengevaluasi efektivitas program dan campaign loyalty.             membuat laporan, insight, dan dashboard sederhana untuk manajemen.             mendukung pengembangan program loyalty (tier, reward, booster, dsb).             melakukan analisa big data, segmented dan terarah.             bersinergi dengan internal it untuk memberikan rekomendasi dalam melakukan transformasi digitalisasi data.

description_text: we’re a music-tech startup on the rise, based in europe and growing our engineering team mainly in indonesia. we’re moving fast, building ambitious products, and we need a backend dev who loves making things scalable, fast, and reliable. this is a full-time remote role (160h/month) with the chance to become a permanent team member after a few months. 🎯 what you’ll do build and ship fast apis and microservices with python + fastapi (and occasionally django where it fits best) . write clean, reliable code that our product depends on every day. work hand-in-hand with frontend engineers and product folks to ship features quickly. keep our data flowing with postgresql (plus a bit of mongodb/redis when needed). make sure everything runs smooth, secure, and scalable. hook up third-party apis and services. share feedback in reviews, bring new ideas, and help level up the whole team. 🛠️ what we’re looking for 3+ years experience building backend systems. strong in python 3 and hands-on with fastapi and/or django. comfortable with async/await and high-performance code. experience with git, docker, and ci/cd. familiar with cloud platforms (aws, gcp, or azure). bonus points if you’ve tuned databases like postgresql, mongodb, or redis. clear communicator — we like teammates who are proactive and collaborative. 💡 why you’ll love it here 100% remote, flexible setup. small team, big impact — your code goes live fast. we’re all about building things that matter (and learning along the way). competitive pay with the opportunity to grow as we scale.

description_text:
company description 
 
 
 about grab and our workplace 
 grab is southeast asia's leading superapp. from getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. in grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of technology and ai to deliver the mission of driving southeast asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility. 
 
 
 job description 
 
 
 get to know the team 
 the gfin analytics team serves as the intelligence engine driving data-informed decisions across our payments and financial services products. as part of the payments tech family, we're instrumental in accelerating cashless payments across all grab verticals. 
 we're looking for analytically rigorous data analysts who have embraced ai as a force multiplier. if you excel at experimentation and behavioral analysis while leveraging llms to work smarter, and if you think in terms of scalable solutions rather than one-off analyses, we want to talk to you. 
 get to know the role 
 we're looking for a senior data scientist (analytics) to lead critical analytical projects for the gfin analytics team at grab. our mission centers on understanding user experiences at a granular level and collaborating with business, product, design, and engineering to deliver the right outcomes and features. you will directly report to the manager. you will be based onsite. 
 the critical tasks you will perform 
 
 design, measure, and recommend a/b tests and multivariate experiments across the platform. these experiments evaluate layout optimization, ui/ux efficacy, contextualization, algorithm performance, and api effectiveness. additionally, use llms to accelerate experiment design, automate statistical analysis, and create insight narratives. 
 extract insights from clickstream and transactional data to understand user behavior across consumers, driver partners, and merchants, translating patterns into relevant product metrics, using ai coding assistants to write and improve complex sql queries. 
 create segmented customer and merchant views that allow business and product team to drive meaningful product iterations, building ai assisted segmentation frameworks that automatically identify emerging patterns and anomalies. 
 transform ambiguous business challenges into structured analytical frameworks and conduct deep dive analyses that yield clear insights, using llms to rapidly prototype analytical approaches and synthesize findings into compelling narratives. 
 balance analytical rigor with technical complexity and explainability while considering real world business constraints, leveraging ai to generate multiple solution approaches and evaluate trade offs efficiently. 
 collaborate with stakeholders to define key metrics, align on measurement strategies, and design robust experimentation approaches, using ai to draft documentation, create presentations, and automate routine reporting. 
 develop data-driven solutions, including reports, dashboards, models, and frameworks, that directly support stakeholder decision making. these solutions involve building ai-powered self-serve analytics tools that scale automatically and systematically. 
 
 
 
 qualifications 
 
 
 what essential skills you will need 
 
 4 years of experience in analytics, business intelligence, or data science, in a tech (fintech or e-commerce) company. 
 a minomum of bachelor's degree in statistics, analytics, economics, mathematics, engineering, or related fields. 
 experience in sql (presto, hive) and visualization tools with solid python or r programming skills, demonstrating daily use of ai and llms to create code faster than traditional methods. 
 experience using ai tools to increase personal productivity with prompt engineering skills for code generation, analysis, and documentation, and ai coding assistants already integrated into your workflow. 
 experience with apply ai solutions versus traditional approaches, can identify high roi automation opportunities, and stays current with llm and genai advancements through rapid experimentation. 
 
 
 
 additional information 
 
 
 life at grab 
 we care about your well-being at grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer: 
 
 we have your back with  term life insurance  and comprehensive  medical insurance. 
 
 with  grabflex,  create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations. 
 celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through  parental  and  birthday leave , and give back to your communities through  love-all-serve-all (lasa)  volunteering leave 
 we have a confidential  grabber assistance programme  to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges. 
 balancing personal commitments and life's demands are made easier with our flexwork arrangements such as differentiated hours 
 
 what we stand for at grab 
 we are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that provides equal opportunity for grabbers to grow and perform at their best. we consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, race, religion, age, gender, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.

job_title: AI Automation Engineer (n8n, Integrasi API, LLM, AI Ops)
description_text: we're hiring! join us in making an impact! at  floothink digital agency , we don’t just build careers—we build a community driven by passion, collaboration, and purpose. our team thrives on  collective empowerment , working together to create meaningful contributions. we believe in  playfulness with responsibility , balancing creativity with ownership and accountability. if you’re someone who embraces  passion for progress , eager to grow and adapt in an ever-evolving world, we want you! we value  empathy & inclusivity , ensuring that everyone—whether teammates, customers, or supporters—feels heard and respected. and above all, we believe in  growth through giving , because true success comes from lifting others up along the way. we are looking for an experienced  ai automation engineer (n8n, integrasi api, llm, ai ops)  who can design, build, and optimize ai-powered automation systems to support digital marketing operations and performance.  this role focuses on integrating tools such as  n8n, apis, llms (claude, gpt), and ai ops systems  to improve the efficiency of  marketing teams across content, ads, crm, and analytics . you will act as the technical brain behind automation workflows from content creation and distribution to performance analysis fully automated and scalable. requirements: - minimum 2-3 years of experience in a similar role, preferably in a digital/creative agency/start up. - experience with automation tools (n8n / zapier / make) - strong api integration skills (rest, webhook, json) - hands-on experience with llms (gpt, claude, etc.) - basic programming (javascript or python) - understanding of automation logic, data pipelines, and prompt engineering - familiar with rag, vector databases, or embeddings - experience handling large-scale automation workflows key responsibilities: - build and optimize automation workflows (n8n / zapier / make) for marketing processes - integrate platforms (social media, crm, ads, internal tools) via apis & webhooks - implement llms (gpt, claude) for content generation, ideation, and chatbots - develop ai systems using context (rag / knowledge base) for brand consistency - monitor and improve system performance (quality, cost, reliability) - create internal tools (ai content generator, campaign builder, reporting dashboards) - collaborate with marketing, creative, and performance teams about us floothink 360 digital agency is a leading full-service digital marketing agency based in jakarta. we help our clients, ranging from startups to large enterprises, achieve their marketing goals through innovative digital strategies. with a team of passionate, creative specialists, we're driven to deliver exceptional results and an outstanding client experience. if you're ready to take the next step in your career,  apply now  to become our  ai automation engineer.

description_text: datalec precision installations (dpi) is a leading provider of data centre design, supply, build, and managed services. we are committed to delivering seamless and integrated solutions for data centre operators worldwide. our team is dedicated to maintaining high standards of service and excellence in every project we undertake. we are seeking a highly skilled and experienced bim coordinator to join our dynamic team in the apac region. the bim coordinator will be instrumental in driving the successful implementation and coordination of bim processes for our complex data center projects. this role requires a deep understanding of bim methodologies, strong technical proﬁciency in bim software, and a forward-thinking approach to integrating emerging technologies, particularly artiﬁcial intelligence (ai), to enhance project delivery and operational eﬃciency. the successful candidate will ensure seamless information ﬂow, clash detection, and model integrity throughout the project lifecycle, from design to construction and hand.  core duties & responsibilities ·       develop, implement, and enforce bim execution plans (bep) and bim standards across all data center projects in the apac region. ensure adherence to project-speciﬁc bim protocols and client requirements. ·       facilitate and manage bim coordination meetings, performing regular clash detection using advanced bim software (e.g., autodesk navisworks, solibri). identify, report, and track resolution of clashes and coordination issues among architectural, structural, mep, and other disciplines. ·       oversee the development, integrity, and maintenance of accurate and up-to-date bim models throughout the project lifecycle, from conceptual design through construction and as-built documentation. ensure models are properly formatted and compatible with various ﬁle formats. ·       manage the ﬂow of digital information, ensuring all stakeholders have access to accurate, consistent, and timely project data. implement robust data exchange protocols and common data environments (cde) to facilitate seamless collaboration. ·       provide technical expertise and support to project teams on bim software applications (e.g., autodesk revit, autocad, civil 3d, tekla structures). troubleshoot bim-related issues and optimize software usage for project eﬃciency. ·       conduct training sessions for project team members on bim software, workﬂows, and best practices to enhance their bim capabilities and ensure consistent application of standards. ·       implement quality control procedures to ensure the accuracy, completeness, and compliance of bim models and deliverables with project speciﬁcations and industry standards. ·       generate comprehensive bim coordination reports, progress updates, and other relevant documentation for project stakeholders. ·       explore and implement ai-driven tools for enhanced clash detection and automated issue resolution, leveraging machine learning algorithms to identify complex conﬂicts and suggest optimal solutions. ·       utilize ai to analyse bim data for predictive insights, such as identifying potential project risks, optimizing resource allocation, and forecasting construction timelines in data center projects. ·       implement ai-powered solutions for automated auditing of bim models to ensure compliance with standards, identify inconsistencies, and improve model quality. ·       collaborate with design teams to explore ai-driven generative design approaches for optimizing data center layouts, energy eﬃciency, and system conﬁgurations. ·       integrate bim with ai-powered real-time monitoring systems to ·       represent the business, upholding our core values and behaviours with all internal and external customers, clients and third parties, ·       maintain business and client confidentiality, adhering to applicable data protection regulations and information security standards in line with company, and group policies and procedures.  qualifications: skills and experience ·       bachelor’s degree in architecture, engineering, construction management, or a related ﬁeld. ·       minimum of 5 years of experience as a bim coordinator or similar role, with a strong portfolio of successful bim projects, preferably in the data center or critical infrastructure sector. ·       proven expertise in bim software, including but not limited to autodesk revit, navisworks, autocad, and other relevant design and coordination platforms. ·       in-depth knowledge of bim standards, protocols, and best practices (e.g., iso 19650). ·       strong understanding of construction processes, particularly in complex mep systems relevant to data centers. ·       excellent communication, interpersonal, and presentation skills, with the ability to eﬀectively collaborate with diverse project teams and stakeholders. ·       demonstrated problem-solving abilities and a proactive approach to identifying and resolving technical challenges. ·       experience with common data environments (cde) platforms. ·       ai/ml proﬁciency (preferred): familiarity with ai/ml concepts and their application in construction, data analysis, or design. experience with ai-powered bim tools or data analytics platforms is a signiﬁcant advantage. values & behaviours:   dpi values dedication                precision                   integrity  behaviours   ·       inspiration -  has a clear vision of where to go and the ability to articulate it. empowers people to implement our vision and strategy. great communicator who captures the imagination, generating trust and commitment.   ·       team spirit -  thinks about "we" not "me"; we do this together. brings purpose to the team to make it a cohesive unit. knows when to seek help and when to give it. prepared to take action to address issues for the good of the team and celebrate others' successes.   ·       self-awareness -  emotionally intelligent; has empathy for others and gets the best out of people by meeting them on their terms. great at building rapport with colleagues and customers; knows that their behavior impacts on the performance of others and adapts approach to achieve the best results.  ·       achievement -  always striving to be the best and consistently delivers. high performer: bringing high energy, competence and making the right decisions to get things done.  ·       tenacity -  relentless in the pursuit of their goals. excellent at solving problems and overcoming obstacles; seeing the challenges before others see them and taking action, to avoid them becoming problems. sees setbacks as opportunities and becomes stronger in adversity.  ·       influence -  highly skilled at getting others committed to the goal. confident, enthusiastic and encourages creativity. understands the needs of stakeholders and as a result, engages them.   our vision   ·      to compete at the highest standards in data centre fit-out, mep construction and managed services throughout europe and beyond.   our mission ·      continue to develop and deliver products and services unparalleled in terms of quality. ·      retain our clients, broaden our breadth of service, identifying closely with their changing requirements. ·      execute a robust h&s and wellbeing strategy.  consider and implement wherever possible initiatives that relate to environmental improvements.   our strategy   ·       people -  build an organisation capable of managing the business we will become.  recruit and retain and develop the best industry professionals.  health, safety and wellbeing remain paramount, for our employees and clients. ·       products -  must address an industry need. we must have differentiators such as assured quality, modularisation, and off-site construction techniques. datalec’s commitment to quality is unsurpassed in the industry, we seek perfection.  new products and services must be delivered to the same exacting standards. ·       purpose -  relates both to our clients and our organisation. we need to understand both how to be able to confidently present our solutions and product strategy to the market. separately, we create a working environment that promotes and rewards employees fairly, actively supporting a culture of transparency and mutual respect.

description_text: we're looking for an experienced  python  /  ml engineer  to join our team and help build innovative  (g)ai and information extraction solutions . about the role you will be working on our journey into  (g)ai and machine learning . not only for our company, but also for our customers. we know what we want to achieve, but the road leading to achieve those goals need to be explored. together with our it team in  jakarta and the netherlands  you will be exploring the frontier of  machine learning , turning complex data into intuitive, automated experiences for our global clientele. what you'll do explore and define  the path to achieve (g)ai implementation goals build, validate, and deploy ml models , especially for  information extraction integrate ml models  into apis and services experiment with  iterative workflows  and work comfortably in the  terminal collaborate with  international teams  to explore new solutions what we're looking for fluent english  (spoken and written) 2+ years of experience in python  (demonstrable via  github repos  or  job experience ) strong  software engineering fundamentals  (testing, typing, deployment) hands-on experience with  natural language processing (nlp) strong  git workflow some exposure to  javascript/typescript and react  for basic frontend support a  proactive mindset : someone who is happy with experiments and exploration nice to have (not required) familiarity with  on-prem deployment experience with  containerization why you'll like working here small team, big impact no endless meetings a challenging role in a professional, supportive environment room to  explore and define  the road ahead salary based on experience  and prior knowledge and  benefits flexible hours and location  (depending on the role)

description_text: senior data engineer (web scraping) 📍  location:  denpasar, bali, indonesia (on-site) 💼  employment type:  full-time 💰  salary:  idr 18m - 25m (depending on experience) about the role we are looking for a  senior data engineer  to join our team in bali. in this role, you will play a key part in building and scaling production-grade web scrapers using modern ai coding assistants and supporting the lead data engineer in technical decisions, project planning, and team coordination. you will also mentor junior and medior engineers while ensuring best practices are followed. responsibilities lead the development and maintenance of scalable, production-grade web scrapers. design, build, and maintain reusable scraper libraries and frameworks. design infra diagrams, define coding standards, workflows and processes with the lead engineer. implement robust monitoring, testing, and alerting systems to ensure reliability. manage and optimize cloud infrastructure (aws/gcp/azure) for large-scale scraping workloads. optimize compute, storage, and proxy usage for performance and cost efficiency. mentor and review code of junior and medior engineers. collaborate with stakeholders to prioritize backlog items and integrate scraper outputs into pipelines. act as second in command to the lead data engineer for technical and project support. requirements must-have skills: strong proficiency in  python  and  sql , with hands-on web scraping experience. hands-on experience building web scrapers using ai coding assistants such as claude code or cursor. deep knowledge of frameworks like  scrapy, playwright, selenium , and anti-bot strategies. experience designing reusable libraries, coding standards, and modular scraper frameworks. proficiency with  cloud infrastructure  (aws/gcp/azure), including compute, storage, and security basics. experience with  docker & kubernetes  for containerization and orchestration. familiarity with  ci/cd pipelines, git workflows, and iac tools  (terraform/cloudformation). strong debugging, performance tuning, and large-scale scraper optimization skills. excellent english communication skills (written & verbal). nice-to-have skills: workflow orchestration (airflow, prefect, dagster). experience setting up ai agents or ai-powered workflows (e.g., using llm apis, agent frameworks, or automation pipelines with ai components). observability/monitoring tools (prometheus, grafana, cloudwatch, elk). cost optimization in cloud and proxy-heavy workloads. knowledge of data governance, rbac, and compliance. exposure to downstream data engineering pipelines (etl/elt, apis, databases). why you’ll love working here be part of a  data-driven company  that values curiosity, precision, and impact. collaborate with talented data engineers and analysts to solve real business challenges. based in beautiful  bali , working directly on-site with a passionate and talented team. if relocating from other parts of indonesia, we offer  one-time reimbursement  for  flights and relocation expenses .

description_text: education : bachelor's degree in computer science/electrical engineering, math, or related field. experience:  minimum 2 strong years of software engineering practices and experiences in data science, machine learning, generative ai. description: we are seeking passionate candidates for a machine learning/ deep learning software engineering role who will join as a machine learning research engineer helping the team build intelligent automotive retail and mobility solutions. responsibilities: as a machine learning engineer, you will contribute to state-of-the-art machine learning infrastructure and relevant software (e.g. supervised learning, reinforcement learning, data management, and evaluation at unparalleled scale). implement cutting-edge deep learning models accelerating model training performance for intelligent automotive retail and mobility system applications. apply the latest advances in deep learning and machine learning to personalize car owners experience manipulate high-volume, high-dimensionality, structured data from automotive retail transactions for to come up with predictions and recommendations that addresses the challenges of the automotive industry. work in a multidisciplinary team and collaborate with other teams across our r&d and delivery team. skills: strong machine learning background with deep understanding of different types of machine learning algorithms (e.g., cnn, rnn, lstm and reinforcement learning). experience of training deep-learning models in an end-to-end fashion. project of statistics (e.g., monte carlo, hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, maximum likelihood, bootstrap, bayesian inference) working knowledge in machine learning algorithms: logistic regression, random forest, gradient boosted trees, neural networks, k-means, and more! excellent verbal and written communication skills

job_title: Associate Product Manager - Subs Growth and Lifecycle
description_text: the economist group is the leading source of analysis on international business and world affairs. we deliver world-class, thought-provoking content through a range of formats, from web and app to print, conferences, film, and audio. what ties us together is the objectivity of our opinion, the originality of our insight, and our advocacy of economic and political freedom around the world. as our digital subscription business grows, so does the importance of delivering thoughtful, frictionless, and value-driven experiences across the entire subscriber lifecycle. about the role we are seeking a motivated associate product manager to join our  subscriber growth & lifecycle  product pillar. in this role, you will support the continuous improvement of subscription journeys that maximise subscriber lifetime value and foster long-term loyalty across web and app. this is a hands-on role with strong exposure to strategy and delivery. you will contribute to initiatives across retention, upgrades, and customer care, working closely with experienced product managers, engineers, analysts, marketers, and customer operations teams. it offers a valuable opportunity to develop deep expertise in subscription products, monetisation, and experimentation within a globally recognised media organisation. what you’ll do as the associate product manager for subscriber growth & lifecycle, you will be responsible for the following with support from more senior product managers: own and optimise the end-to-end subscriber journey:  you will be the product manager for key in-life subscription experiences, including upgrades, downgrades, cancellations, and re-engagement flows. you will continuously identify and address friction points, and champion a subscriber-first mindset in everything you do. drive monetisation and experimentation:  you will develop and execute a roadmap of monetisation initiatives, including offers, add-ons, and subscription tiers. you will design and run experiments to optimise our upgrade and retention paywalls, and use data to inform our pricing and packaging strategies. innovate in customer care:  you will partner with our customer care teams to redefine how we serve our subscribers. you will lead the development of our self-service and assisted service journeys, including implementing ai-powered bots and other automation technologies to improve efficiency and customer satisfaction. champion a data-driven culture:  you will define and analyse key metrics such as churn, upgrades, engagement, and customer satisfaction. you will use this data to measure the impact of your initiatives, identify new opportunities, and communicate your progress to stakeholders. lead with influence:  you will write clear and compelling user stories, acceptance criteria, and product documentation. you will use your strong communication and collaboration skills to align your team and stakeholders around a shared vision and roadmap. what you’ll bring we are looking for a candidate who is passionate about building great products and eager to learn and grow. the ideal candidate will have: a proven track record of driving results:  you have at least 2 years of experience in product management or a similar role (such as product marketing or product analytics) with a focus on digital customer journeys. you can point to specific examples of how you have used offers, discounts, add-ons, or subscription tiers to achieve business goals. a deep understanding of the subscriber lifecycle:  you have experience with paywall campaigns, experiments, or launches across web and app. you are familiar with the key levers for driving subscriber engagement, retention, and lifetime value. a strategic and analytical mindset:  you are comfortable working in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment with shifting priorities. you have a structured, data-informed approach to problem-solving and prioritisation. you are proficient in using data to make decisions and measure success. exceptional collaboration and communication skills:  you are a natural collaborator who can work effectively with designers, engineers, analysts, and operational teams. you can articulate your ideas clearly and persuasively, and you are a great listener. a "go-getter" mindset with high autonomy:  you are a self-starter who takes initiative and can run with things independently. while you will have support from senior pms, you are comfortable taking the lead on projects, navigating ambiguity, and proactively pushing initiatives to completion. nice to have: experience managing monetisation for a b2c app and web product. exposure to monetisation automation, personalisation, or machine-learning-driven decisioning. familiarity with subscription platforms or lifecycle marketing tools (e.g., zuora, sf). experience with data analysis and visualisation tools (e.g., amplitude, tableau, sql). why this role matters this is an opportunity to make a real impact on the economist's future. by improving our in-life subscription experience, you will not only drive revenue growth but also help us build a more sustainable and resilient business. you will be at the heart of our efforts to create a lifelong relationship with our readers and to ensure that the economist remains the world's leading source of analysis on international business and world affairs for generations to come. location: this role is based in  south east asia .
requirements: AI, Acceptance Criteria, Advocacy, Analyse, Analysts, Analytical, Articulate, Asia, Associate, Audio, Automation Technologies, Autonomy, B2C, Bots, Bring, Business Goals, Campaigns, Cancellations, Class, Collaborator, Communicate, Communication And Collaboration, Conferences, Content, Continuous Improvement, Contribute, Culture, Customer Care, Customer Satisfaction, Data Analysis, Define, Delivering, Delivery, Designers, Development, Digital, Documentation, Driving, Effectively, Efficiency, End To End, Engagement, Engineers, Experimentation, Fast Paced, Flows, Focus, Foster, Go, Group, Help, Ideal, Impact, Improving, Inform, Initiative, Initiatives, International Business, Lifecycle, Listener, Location, Loyalty, Machine Learning, Marketing Tools, Media, Metrics, Natural, Navigating, Nice, Offers, Operational, Opportunities, Opportunity, Packaging, Partner, Platforms, Pricing, Print, Proactively, Problem Solving, Product Analytics, Product Management, Product Manager, Product Managers, Product Marketing, Progress, Range, Resilient, Retention, Revenue Growth, Roadmap, SQL, Self Service, Self Starter, Serve, Shifting Priorities, Stakeholders, Strategies, Strategy, Structured Data, Subscriber Growth, Subscription, Tableau, Together, Upgrade, Upgrades, User Stories, Vision, Zuora, Exp: 2 years

description_text: posisi : senior computer vision engineer lokasi : onsite (jabodetabek/cikarang/karawang) jenis : full-time (masa probation 3 bulan) deskripsi pekerjaan posisi ini bertanggung jawab atas desain, pengembangan, dan implementasi solusi computer vision berbasis machine learning dan deep learning untuk lingkungan industri. peran ini berfokus pada pembangunan sistem inspeksi visual yang akurat, andal, dan siap produksi, serta berkolaborasi erat dengan tim hardware, iot, dan software untuk memastikan integrasi end-to-end yang optimal. tanggung jawab mendesain dan mengembangkan algoritma computer vision untuk aplikasi industri seperti defect detection, object detection, classification, segmentation, dan optical character recognition (ocr). mengembangkan, melatih, dan mengoptimalkan model machine learning dan deep learning menggunakan arsitektur modern seperti cnn, resnet, efficientnet, yolo, vision transformer (vit), dan u-net. membangun pipeline end-to-end mulai dari data collection, annotation, preprocessing, training, validation, hingga deployment. mengoptimalkan performa model untuk kebutuhan produksi dengan mempertimbangkan akurasi, latency, throughput, dan resource efficiency. mengimplementasikan dan melakukan deployment model pada edge device, industrial pc, atau lingkungan cloud. berkolaborasi dengan tim iot dan field engineer untuk memastikan kesesuaian sistem kamera, pencahayaan, dan hardware dengan kebutuhan model ai. melakukan tuning dan evaluasi performa model di lingkungan nyata, termasuk analisis error dan continuous improvement. mengembangkan dan memelihara kode produksi yang scalable, modular, dan terdokumentasi dengan baik. menyusun dokumentasi teknis tingkat engineering, termasuk arsitektur model, eksperimen, dan laporan performa. menjadi representasi teknis dalam diskusi dengan klien dan pemangku kepentingan (engineer-to-engineer discussion). kualifikasi pendidikan minimal s1 (di universitas ternama) teknik informatika, ilmu komputer, teknik elektro, artificial intelligence, atau bidang terkait atau s2; s3 menjadi nilai tambah. pengalaman minimal 5–10 tahun di bidang computer vision, machine learning, atau artificial intelligence. berpengalaman dalam pengembangan model computer vision menggunakan framework seperti tensorflow, pytorch, atau opencv. memahami arsitektur modern seperti cnn, yolo, faster r-cnn, ssd, u-net, dan vision transformer. menguasai bahasa pemrograman python dan library terkait seperti numpy, pandas, dan scikit-learn. berpengalaman dalam data preprocessing, data augmentation, dan evaluasi model. memahami teknik optimasi dan deployment seperti tensorrt, onnx, openvino, atau model quantization. memiliki pengalaman dalam pengolahan citra industri dan sistem inspeksi visual. memahami konsep mlops, versioning model, dan eksperimen terstruktur. mampu bekerja dengan nvidia cuda, jetpack, linux, docker, dan git. memiliki kemampuan analitis yang kuat serta mampu memecahkan masalah kompleks secara mandiri. mampu berkomunikasi dengan baik dan bekerja dalam tim lintas disiplin. bersedia melakukan perjalanan dinas dan bekerja di site pelanggan. keuntungan kesempatan mengembangkan solusi ai dan computer vision untuk industri berskala internasional. lingkungan kerja inovatif di bidang artificial intelligence dan otomasi industri. akses ke teknologi mutakhir dan proyek berdampak tinggi. pelatihan profesional dan peluang pengembangan karier. paket kompensasi yang kompetitif sesuai pengalaman dan keahlian. nilai tambah (opsional) pengalaman dalam pengembangan sistem inspeksi visual di sektor manufaktur. familiar dengan integrasi ai pada edge computing dan embedded systems seperti nvidia jetson. pengetahuan tentang iot, industrial automation, dan integrasi dengan plc atau scada. pengalaman dalam penggunaan tools anotasi data seperti cvat, labelstuedio, atau roboflow. kontribusi dalam publikasi ilmiah, paten, atau proyek open-source di bidang ai. pengalaman dalam penggunaan layanan cloud seperti aws, google cloud, atau microsoft azure. kemampuan dalam c++ untuk pengembangan sistem berperforma tinggi. pemahaman tentang 3d vision, stereo vision, atau hyperspectral imaging.
