description_text: requirement for middle level: 1. min experiences  3-5 years  as data engineer ( junior,middle, senior level) 2. experience in writing sql query, sql function and sql procedure is mandatory 3. experience in develop microsoft power bi dashboard is mandatory 4. have experience in ssrs reporting,  google big query, etl & data pipeline is advantage. 5. have knowledge and experience in data science with phyton is advantage. requirement for junior level : 1. programming and scripting: proficiency in python, java, or scala for pipeline development. 2. database management: expertise in sql and gogle big query 3. data modeling: ability to design schema and data models optimized for analytics. 4. big data tools: knowledge of platforms like hadoop, spark, kafka, or flink for processing large datasets. problem solving: analytical skills for troubleshooting pipeline issues, optimizing performance, and ensuring data integrity. core responsibilities 1. data pipeline development and management data engineers create and manage the pipelines that extract data from various sources, transform it into usable formats, and load it into databases or data warehouses (etl/elt processes). they ensure that data flows reliably from source systems to reporting and analytics platforms. 2. data storage and architecture they design and maintain scalable and secure data storage solutions, such as relational databases, nosql databases, and cloud-based data warehouses. they establish schemas, indexing strategies, and storage models optimized for performance and analytics. 3. data quality and governance data engineers enforce data quality standards, implement validation and cleansing processes, and monitor pipelines to detect and resolve inconsistencies. they also ensure compliance with data governance policies and standards, including privacy regulations. 4. performance optimization and scalability optimizing database queries, improving pipeline performance, and planning for scalable infrastructure to manage growing datasets are key responsibilities. this includes tuning systems to handle large-scale batch and real-time processing efficiently. 5. collaboration with stakeholders data engineers work closely with data scientists, analysts, and business teams to understand their data requirements and provide reliable datasets for analysis, reporting, and machine learning applications. 6. tooling and automation they leverage tools such as apache spark, hadoop, kafka, airflow, and cloud services like aws, azure, or google cloud platform to automate workflows and manage large-scale data processing.

description_text: pt. nusantara duta solusindo is seeking data engineer  to join and strengthen our team. we are looking for a candidate who is passionate about technology, has a strong analytical mindset, excels in problem-solving, and has a proven track record in developing effective software solutions for complex systems. responsibilities design, build, and maintain scalable and reliable data pipelines (etl/elt). develop and optimize data warehouse and database systems (on-premise or cloud-based). ensure data quality, consistency, and validation across multiple sources. collaborate with data analysts, data scientists, and cross-functional teams to understand data needs. deliver clean, well-structured data for reporting, analytics, and machine learning purposes. implement monitoring, alerting, and logging for data workflows. create and maintain comprehensive technical documentation. qualifications bachelor’s degree in computer science, information technology, mathematics, or a related field. minimum 2 years of experience working as a data engineer or in a similar role. strong understanding of  sql , data modeling, and etl/elt processes. experience with data pipeline tools such as  apache airflow ,  dbt ,  talend , or  luigi . proficient in at least one programming language (e.g.,  python ,  scala , or  java ). familiarity with cloud platforms such as  google cloud platform (bigquery) ,  aws (redshift) , or  azure data factory . knowledge of data warehousing and data lake concepts. experience with version control systems (e.g., git) and ci/cd tools for data workflows is a plus. strong communication skills and ability to work in an agile team environment.

description_text: about us: at pt pro teknologi siber, we're at the cutting edge of ai innovation. our mission is to drive transformative solutions using the power of artificial intelligence to shape the future of computer vision. we believe in fostering a culture of collaboration, learning, and personal growth. our team thrives on challenging projects that make a real-world impact, and we're excited to expand our ai capabilities with driven, passionate individuals like you. role overview: we are looking for a  junior ai engineer  to join our dynamic team and contribute to the development of ai models, including  computer vision  applications. in this role, you’ll assist in designing, implementing, and optimizing ai systems using machine learning and deep learning techniques such as convolutional neural networks (cnns) and object detection frameworks. you'll play a key role in data preprocessing, ensuring data quality and integrity, while also supporting the testing and validation of computer vision models. you will collaborate closely with senior engineers to learn and grow in this rapidly evolving field. what you'll do: develop ai & computer vision models : assist in the creation and refinement of machine learning and deep learning models, including computer vision applications like image classification, object detection, and image segmentation using frameworks such as tensorflow, keras, and pytorch. code implementation : write clean, efficient, and scalable code in python, java, or scala to implement ai algorithms, particularly for computer vision tasks. data management : support the team in managing, cleaning, and preprocessing image and video data, ensuring high-quality inputs for training and evaluation of computer vision models. testing & validation : help test and validate ai and computer vision systems, ensuring their performance and reliability across a variety of use cases. continuous learning : stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in ai and computer vision, integrating new techniques into your work to improve model performance and innovation. team collaboration : work closely with senior engineers and cross-functional teams, contributing ideas and solutions while also enhancing your own technical skills. what we're looking for: educational background : a degree in computer science, engineering, data science, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience). technical skills : experience or coursework in machine learning, deep learning, and computer vision, with proficiency in python, java, or scala. familiarity with frameworks like tensorflow, keras, pytorch, opencv, or similar is a plus. data handling : solid understanding of data preprocessing techniques, especially for image and video data, and familiarity with data augmentation and annotation methods for computer vision tasks. problem-solving mindset : a curious and analytical mindset, eager to tackle complex computer vision problems and innovate. team player : strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively within a team and learn from others. growth-oriented : passionate about ai and computer vision, with a desire to continuously develop your technical skills and knowledge. why join us? learning & development : be part of a culture that encourages continuous learning and professional growth, with access to resources, mentorship, and real-world experience. impactful work : contribute to projects that make a meaningful impact in [industry or field], using ai and computer vision to solve real-world challenges. collaborative environment : work with a passionate team of engineers and ai experts who support each other’s growth and innovation. innovation at scale : engage with some of the most cutting-edge ai technologies and tools to create solutions that will shape the future. we are seeking candidates who are not only qualified but also possess genuine interest in joining and growing with our team. if you are considering multiple offers or are still uncertain, we appreciate your honesty at the outset of the process. if you're excited about the potential of ai and computer vision and are looking for an opportunity to grow in a supportive, forward-thinking company, we'd love to hear from you!

job_title: Senior Data Scientist (Analytics) - Grab Financial Services
description_text:
company description 
 
 
 about grab and our workplace 
 grab is southeast asia's leading superapp. from getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. in grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of technology and ai to deliver the mission of driving southeast asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility. 
 
 
 job description 
 
 
 get to know the team 
 grabfin analytics team supports the gfin product and business organisations, across payments, lending, insurance, and kios. as a senior data scientist (analytics), you will be part of the lending tech family where we strive to be the best fintech company in the region. our team is focused on understanding user experiences and partnering with business, product, design, and tech teams to achieve the right outcomes. we are integral to product development, from understanding user journeys with ux designers, to developing hypotheses, through to post-rollout optimisation. 
 get to know the role 
 you will use data to understand user needs and be the de-facto voice of the customer (users, driver-partners, merchants, agents) across lending's suite of products. you will leverage data to unveil insights to help launch, improve and scale our products. you will champion data-driven decision-making within gfin and partner with product managers, business owners, ux designers, and engineers to design analytical projects that drive the product roadmap. you will provide thought leadership and generate data-driven hypotheses to solve key product and business problems, and drive our gfin strategies forward. you will report into the lending analytics manager and work onsite in the jakarta south quarter office. 
 the critical tasks you will perform 
 
 you will partner with product, design, and engineering teams to derive insights, design experiments, and drive key product decisions. 
 you will support strategic plans with data insights, performing deep-dives into user behaviour, segmented views and product efficacy. 
 you will provide tailored analysis for specific products and strategies, define critical business and product metrics, and make regular recommendations for continuous improvements. 
 you will design, measure, and recommend a/b tests and multivariate experiments, including layout optimisation, ui/ux efficacy, algorithm effectiveness, and api performance. 
 you will analyse clickstream and transactional data to uncover insights on user behaviour and drive product metrics. you will manage instrumentation for all feature releases within assigned tech families within gfin. 
 you will develop self-serve solutions for stakeholders that are scalable and automated to handle a product environment. you will drive plans involving large language models or generative artificial intelligence. 
 
 
 
 qualifications 
 
 
 what essential skills you will need 
 
 you have at least 4 years of experience in analytics, business intelligence, or data science, in a tech (fintech or e-commerce) company. 
 you have a bachelor's degree in statistics, analytics, economics, mathematics, engineering, or related fields. 
 you are proficient in writing advanced sql queries and querying large relational databases. 
 you have hands-on experience with data analysis and programming tools such as python. 
 you are skilled in data visualisation platforms like powerbi or d3.js to present findings. 
 you have experience designing, running, and analysing a/b tests and product experiments, with knowledge of hypothesis testing and the basic principles of design of experiments (doe). 
 
 
 
 additional information 
 
 
 life at grab 
 we care about your well-being at grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer: 
 
 we have your back with  term life insurance  and comprehensive  medical insurance. 
 
 with  grabflex,  create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations. 
 celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through  parental  and  birthday leave , and give back to your communities through  love-all-serve-all (lasa)  volunteering leave 
 we have a confidential  grabber assistance programme  to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges. 
 balancing personal commitments and life's demands are made easier with our flexwork arrangements such as differentiated hours 
 
 what we stand for at grab 
 we are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that provides equal opportunity for grabbers to grow and perform at their best. we consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, race, religion, age, gender, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.

description_text: core responsibilities: build and maintain data pipelines and datasets to support analytics and ai use cases. develop simple apis or services to enable data and ai features. perform data analysis to identify trends, issues, and opportunities. apply a basic understanding of ai/ml concepts to collaborate effectively with technical teams (no deep research required). requirements: achievement-oriented with a strong drive to meet targets and deliver results. strong selling and negotiation skills. proficient in microsoft office (and/or office management tools). good understanding of business processes. bachelor’s degree (s1) in information technology, management, or a related field. relevant certifications in data, ai enablement, ai, or foundational machine learning. 1–2 years of relevant experience. experience in roles such as ai data support, ai enablement engineer, or analytics engineer. experience with data analysis libraries (e.g., pandas, numpy, or similar). basic understanding of machine learning concepts. familiarity with ai use cases such as chatbots, recommendation systems, or forecasting. good command of english (written and spoken)

description_text: we are seeking highly skilled ai automation & systems specialist to design and implement automation to our digital transformation within our organization. this role focuses on developing and maintain sophisticated ai-driven workflows and internal systems that reduce manual work, improve efficiency, and integrate multiple platforms within our operations. key responsibilities: design and build automation workflows across internal systems implement ai integrations to improvae operational efficiency build automation using tools such as make.com, zapier, power automate, or n8n integrate apis between internal tools, crm system, and third-party platforms build and deploy ai agents and ai-assisted workflows work with management team to identify processes that can be automated maintain and improve existing automation infrastructure document automation systems and workflows required skills & experience: proven hands-on experience building workflows and ai agent using automation platforms such as    make.com, zapier, n8n, or power automate experience building ai chatbots, including setting up and optimizing rag-based knowledge bases for accurate performance strong technical understanding of ai tools and ai workflows experience working with ai agents or llm tools (claude, gpt, etc.) comfortable working with apis and system integrations strong basic command line / terminal experience (cli) ability to identify and troubleshoot automation workflows and technical integrations strong problem-solving ability and technical curiosity highly desirable: experience building ai agents or multi-step ai workflows experience integrating ai into business processes familiarity with webhooks, apis, and data pipelines basic scripting ability (python, javascript, or similar) what we offer: opportunity to build ai systems within a fast-growing organization work directly with management team on automation strategy freedom to experiment with cutting-edge ai tools

description_text:
support the sales cycle, covering the technical architecture, data strategy, and ai capabilities of data cloud and agentforce. 
 design, build, and present hands-on proof of concepts (pocs) and demonstrations for data cloud and agentforce, showcasing their power and viability to technical stakeholders. 
 explain the technical and business benefits of the salesforce customer 360 platform, with a strong focus on data cloud and agentforce, to it and technical stakeholders. 
 understand, assess, and define technical customer requirements, focusing on ai, data management, and operational data utilisation. 
 advise cio/cto/cxo-level contacts and their it teams on adopting cloud architectures, particularly how to leverage unified customer data and generative ai effectively. 
 answer deep technical questions related to the capabilities and integration of salesforce data cloud, ai, and agentforce solutions. 
 establish close relationships with customer technical stakeholders and act as a trusted advisor on data and ai strategy. 
 respond to rfps, focusing on the technical components of data, ai, and integration. 
 coach and mentor fellow pre-sales colleagues on the technical aspects of data cloud and agentforce. 
 be a thought leader on specific technology topics like generative ai and data strategy. 
 drive innovation projects with impact (pocs, mvps). 
 maintain awareness of technical best practices related to data governance, security, and compliance. 
 
 minimum qualifications: 
 
 proven track record of running hands-on, successful technical proof of concepts (pocs) for complex ai and/or data solutions. 
 relevant background and deep technical expertise in ai, machine learning, and/or advanced data solutions (e.g., cdp, data warehousing, data lake, etc.). 
 fluent in english and local language (bahasa) 
 experience in pre-sales, e.g., solution engineering or technical architecture. 
 multi-year experience in software, system, or enterprise architecture disciplines. 
 strong understanding of data integration patterns, data synchronisation, and data volume considerations in a cloud environment. 
 good understanding of the architectural principles of cloud-based platforms, including saas, paas, multitenancy, and multi-tiered infrastructure. 
 general interest in staying at the forefront of current technology developments and keeping knowledge up to date. 
 
 preferred qualifications: 
 
 direct experience with salesforce data cloud, agentforce, marketing cloud, or service cloud (agentforce) solutions. 
 experience with large language models (llms) and generative ai architectures. 
 salesforce certified architect or relevant data/ai certifications (e.g., aws, azure, gcp data/ml certifications). 
 knowledge of relevant data privacy and compliance requirements is a plus. 
 knowledge of data architecture principles, including data modeling, etl/elt, data governance, and data quality. 
 
 tentang salesforcesalesforce adalah crm ai terkemuka, di mana manusia dan agen bekerja sama untuk mencapai kesuksesan pelanggan. di sini, ambisi bertemu dengan tindakan. teknologi bertemu dengan kepercayaan. dan inovasi bukan sekadar istilah populer — itu adalah cara hidup. dunia kerja yang kita kenal sedang berubah, dan kami mencari trailblazers yang bersemangat untuk meningkatkan bisnis dan dunia melalui ai, mendorong inovasi, dan menjaga nilai-nilai inti salesforce di pusat segala hal. siap untuk mengembangkan karier anda di perusahaan yang memimpin transformasi tenaga kerja di era agen? anda berada di tempat yang tepat! agentforce adalah masa depan ai, dan anda adalah masa depan salesforce. bersama dengan karyawan, pelanggan, dan mitra kami, kami bekerja untuk meningkatkan kondisi dunia. komitmen kami terhadap budaya yang didorong oleh nilai-nilai — yang berakar pada kepercayaan, kesuksesan pelanggan, inovasi, dan kesetaraan — adalah alasan mengapa kami secara konsisten diakui sebagai salah satu pemberi kerja terkemuka di dunia. insinyur solusi datacloud dan agentforce adalah anggota kunci dari tim pra-penjualan. fokus peran ini adalah menangani topik teknis kompleks dalam siklus penjualan, khususnya untuk solusi data cloud dan agentforce kami. anda akan berperan penting dalam membantu pelanggan memahami bagaimana kemampuan salesforce generasi berikutnya ini cocok dan terintegrasi ke dalam lanskap arsitektur mereka yang sudah ada. komponen kritis dari peran ini adalah bertindak sebagai ahli teknis yang praktis yang merancang, mengembangkan, dan mengimplementasikan proof of concepts (poc) dan hackathons untuk solusi data cloud dan agentforce. ini melibatkan transformasi visi arsitektur menjadi solusi yang nyata dan berfungsi, yang menunjukkan kekuatan data terpadu yang didorong oleh ai kepada pelanggan kami. topik yang dibahas meliputi arsitektur ai/machine learning, unifikasi data, arsitektur data skala besar, pemodelan data, kinerja solusi, dan pola integrasi sistem.dampak anda – tanggung jawab: 
 mendukung siklus penjualan dengan membahas arsitektur teknis, strategi data, dan kemampuan ai dari data cloud dan agentforce. 
 merancang, membangun, dan mempresentasikan proof of concepts (poc) dan demonstrasi praktis untuk data cloud dan agentforce, menampilkan kekuatan dan kelayakannya kepada pemangku kepentingan teknis.   
 menjelaskan manfaat teknis dan bisnis platform salesforce customer 360, dengan fokus kuat pada data cloud dan agentforce, kepada pemangku kepentingan it dan teknis.   
 memahami, mengevaluasi, dan mendefinisikan persyaratan teknis pelanggan, dengan fokus pada ai, manajemen data, dan pemanfaatan data operasional. 
 memberikan saran kepada kontak tingkat cio/cto/cxo dan tim it mereka tentang adopsi arsitektur cloud, terutama cara memanfaatkan data pelanggan terpadu dan ai generatif secara efektif.   
 menjawab pertanyaan teknis mendalam terkait kemampuan dan integrasi solusi salesforce data cloud, ai, dan agentforce.   
 membangun hubungan dekat dengan pemangku kepentingan teknis pelanggan dan bertindak sebagai penasihat tepercaya dalam strategi data dan ai. 
 menanggapi rfp, dengan fokus pada komponen teknis data, ai, dan integrasi.   
 membimbing dan membina rekan kerja pra-penjualan dalam aspek teknis data cloud dan agentforce.   
 menjadi pemimpin pemikiran dalam topik teknologi spesifik seperti ai generatif dan strategi data.   
 menggerakkan proyek inovasi berdampak (poc, mvp).   
 menjaga kesadaran akan praktik terbaik teknis terkait tata kelola data, keamanan, dan kepatuhan. 
 persyaratan minimum: 
 rekam jejak yang terbukti dalam mengelola proof of concepts (poc) teknis yang sukses untuk solusi ai dan/atau data yang kompleks. 
 latar belakang relevan dan keahlian teknis mendalam dalam ai, machine learning, dan/atau solusi data lanjutan (misalnya cdp, data warehousing, data lake, dll.). 
 menguasai bahasa inggris dan bahasa lokal (bahasa). 
 pengalaman dalam pra-penjualan, misalnya rekayasa solusi atau arsitektur teknis. 
 pengalaman bertahun-tahun dalam disiplin arsitektur perangkat lunak, sistem, atau arsitektur perusahaan. 
 pemahaman yang kuat tentang pola integrasi data, sinkronisasi data, dan pertimbangan volume data dalam lingkungan cloud. 
 pemahaman yang baik tentang prinsip arsitektur platform berbasis cloud, termasuk saas, paas, multitenancy, dan infrastruktur berlapis.   
 minat umum untuk tetap berada di garis depan perkembangan teknologi terkini dan memperbarui pengetahuan.   
 kualifikasi yang diutamakan:   
 pengalaman langsung dengan solusi salesforce data cloud, agentforce, marketing cloud, atau service cloud (agentforce). 
 pengalaman dengan model bahasa besar (llms) dan arsitektur ai generatif. 
 sertifikasi salesforce certified architect atau sertifikasi data/ai yang relevan (misalnya, aws, azure, gcp data/ml). 
 pengetahuan tentang persyaratan privasi dan kepatuhan data yang relevan merupakan nilai tambah. 
 pengetahuan tentang prinsip arsitektur data, termasuk pemodelan data, etl/elt, tata kelola data, dan kualitas data.

description_text: steradian data optima  is looking for a  presales – ai & data solutions  to help customers turn business challenges into impactful ai and modern data platform solutions. in this role, you will work closely with sales and technical teams to design, position, and present solutions built on  databricks, snowflake, and compatible open-source technologies . we're looking for someone with a strong technical foundation in  ai / ml / data science , combined with the ability to engage customers and drive solution conversations confidently. what you'll do • support sales in positioning  ai and data solutions • understand customer needs and translate them into solution designs • present  architectures, demos, and pocs • create proposals and support technical discussions with customers • work with internal teams to ensure solutions are scalable and practical requirements • minimum  2 years experience  in  ml, ai, or data science implementation • experience as a  data scientist  or similar technical role • minimum  1 year experience in presales  or customer-facing technical role • familiar with  databricks, snowflake , or similar open-source data platforms • good understanding of: o  python o  apache spark / pyspark o ml frameworks such as  scikit-learn, tensorflow, or pytorch o data engineering and analytics workflows • familiar with cloud platforms such as  aws, azure, gcp, and alibaba cloud • strong communication, presentation, and problem-solving skills nice to have • experience with  databricks lakehouse  or  snowflake data cloud • exposure to  mlops  or model deployment • experience supporting enterprise ai or data modernization initiatives join steradian data optima  and help shape real-world ai and data solutions for enterprise customers.

description_text: about the company we are a leading main construction contractor specializing in data center development. our projects demand high precision, strong technical knowledge, and strict adherence to cost, quality, and timeline standards. we are looking for a quantity surveyor to join our team and support the commercial and cost management aspects of our ongoing and upcoming data center projects. key responsibilities: ·       prepare, review, and manage cost estimates, bills of quantities (boq), and tender documentation for data center construction projects. ·       evaluate and compare supplier, vendor, and subcontractor quotations to ensure compliance with project requirements. ·       conduct cost control and financial reporting throughout all project stages. ·       manage and monitor variations, change orders, and progress claims. ·       support contract negotiation, procurement, and tender evaluation processes. ·       work closely with the project management, engineering, and procurement teams to ensure cost-effective project execution. ·       conduct site visits to assess progress, verify quantities, and ensure compliance with contractual obligations. ·       prepare monthly valuations, cash flow forecasts, and cost-to-complete reports. ·       assist in resolving contractual and commercial disputes. ·       ensure all cost and commercial documentation complies with company standards, policies, and client requirements.  qualifications and education requirements ·       bachelor’s degree in mep engineering or related field especially has a strong knowledge and experience in quantity surveying. ·       minimum 3–5 years of experience in a quantity surveyor or cost engineer role within construction or infrastructure projects ( data center experience preferred ). ·       strong knowledge of construction contracts and procurement processes. ·       proficiency in microsoft excel, autocad, negotiations, etc. ·        can both speak english and bahasa ·       excellent numerical, analytical, and communication skills. ·       detail-oriented, organized, and capable of managing multiple priorities under tight deadlines. ·       knowledge of mep systems and data center-specific infrastructure is an advantage.

description_text: didirikan pada tahun 2006, nabel sakha kini terbagi menjadi tiga perusahaan dengan fokus yang berbeda :  pt nabel sakha gemilang  yang berfokus pada distribusi pelumas industri,  pt rafitama millenial wahyudi  yang berfokus pada distribusi komponen hidrolik dan pneumatik, dan  pt dimensi quantum wahyudi  yang berfokus pada distribusi komponen vakum dan sistem penanganan ( handling systems ). nabel sakha group berkomitmen untuk hanya mendistribusikan produk-produk berkualitas dengan solusi praktis guna memberikan produk dan layanan terbaik yang tersedia bagi para pelanggan setianya, dengan komitmen penuh terhadap kepuasan pelanggan job desription : mencari dan mengidentifikasi peluang bisnis baru (leads) di segmen manufaktur/b2b. melakukan presentasi produk/layanan yang persuasif dan melakukan demo produk kepada calon klien. menyusun proposal bisnis, melakukan negosiasi kontrak, dan memastikan penutupan penjualan ( closing ) sesuai target mengelola data prospek di sistem crm dan memberikan laporan aktivitas penjualan secara berkala. memantau tren pasar dan aktivitas kompetitor untuk memberikan masukan strategis kepada perusahaan. menjaga hubungan baik dengan klien lama ( existing accounts ) untuk memastikan adanya pembelian berulang ( repeat order ) requirements : pendidikan minimal  s1  (semua jurusan, namun untuk jurusan lebih diutamakan) pengalaman minimal  1-3 tahun  di bidang sales b2b atau  corporate sales . memiliki kemampuan komunikasi, presentasi, dan negosiasi yang sangat baik. berorientasi pada target ( target-driven ) dan memiliki motivasi kerja yang tinggi. mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim. memiliki jaringan ( networking ) yang luas di industri lubricant dan pneumatic hidrolik adalah nilai tambah. fasih berbahasa inggris (lisan & tulisan) akan menjadi poin plus. memiliki kendaraan pribadi dan sim yang aktif. (sim a) siap ditempatkan di area  bekasi.

description_text: about us with a strong track record of supporting customer success for over 75 years, oil states industries is a technology-focused and major global provider of integrated energy systems & solutions to oil and natural gas markets. at oil states industries, we cultivate a culture that recognizes our employees are our greatest asset. together, we focus on innovation, teamwork, and our commitments to our customers. our people embrace mutual respect, ethical behavior, and work-life balance in our relentless pursuit for growth, diversity as well as high standards in safety, quality, and performance. we now have an exciting career opportunity for an aspiring individual to make an impact, develop your capabilities and unleash your potential with oil state industries as a qc engineer. this position will be based in batam, indonesia. job description: report to qc superintendent/ qhse manager on quality matters on day-to-day basis. supervise and direct qc inspectors and nde technicians. satisfy the ndt level iii requirements, and provide required training and evaluations, and maintain visual test records. conduct project briefing and monitoring with inspectors on shop-floor. coordinate nonconformities identification, initialization and finalization of nonconformities reports and involve in root cause analysis, corrective actions and improvement action. create and updates quality plans, inspection test plans, and notification of inspections on timely manner. ensure the qc inspectors are preparing and issuing qc reports in a timely manner. review the qc reports and data book for accuracy of information on daily basis in master control. liaise with vendors for inspection activity & perform regular surveillances including ncr, ndt, machining. liaise with customers and tpi for the inspection surveillances activities. respond and attend customer complaints immediately. respond to critical matters from internal/ external customers and keep the communication effectively. summarize and report qc activity on weekly basis and report to qhse manager. supervise the validity of inspection results, the effectiveness of quality systems at all levels. communicate to qc team about weekend qc resource plan. maintain qc related documentation in master control system. prepare procedures, work instructions and documents related with product/ processes quality control. participate in internal / external vendor quality audits. attend the meetings as required by the company and facilitate meetings to resolve quality issues. prepare and issue rt request / test request and communicate to vendors in liaison with production. monitor that the calibration of tools and equipment and records are maintained. review ndt results and resolve if any discontinuity and defect reported. qualification: minimum bachelor’s degree in engineering or equivalent. aws or cswip welding inspector certification is required. asnt ndt level ii or similar qualifications/certifications is essential. knowledge in api 6a, api 16a, api 16c, api 1104, api std 64, nace mr0175, asme viii & ix & astm ndt standards. overall, 7 years of qc engineer experience comprising minimum 4 years of work experience in manufacture, repair and remanufacture of drilling equipment and tubular products background with overseeing a team of inspectors are expected. experience in training and auditing. working proficiency in english. applicable for indonesian

description_text: kinobi ai  is a singapore-based company dedicated to transforming higher education by helping universities go beyond just academics. we focus on holistic student success, leveraging ai-powered solutions to ensure that students are well-prepared for their careers. we're looking for individuals who share our vision and want to make a meaningful impact in the future of education. our purpose is to: empower institutions to guide their beneficiaries toward meaningful employment opportunities through ai-driven solutions. demonstrate to the world that a global ai-powered b2b saas enterprise can be successfully built from southeast asia. about the role: as a  full stack software engineer  at kinobi ai, you will play a crucial role in developing our core platform and shaping the future of our ai-driven products. you will be responsible for building scalable, maintainable, and high-quality code, while also contributing to the development of intelligent features that support holistic education and student career readiness. key responsibilities: work directly with the cto on occasions to ensure we build an intelligent, ai-powered, customer-loving product for our clients. support the development and eventually take ownership of the application development roadmap — including ai-integrated feature planning, technical research, prioritization, and action planning. take ownership of the full development lifecycle and operate closely like a forward-deployed engineer, especially in shaping ai-first features. push the frontier of kinobi’s ai capabilities and technological innovation in the era of intelligent education tools. develop core modules with clean, scalable architecture that supports future ai integrations and performance. drive the launch and development of new ai-enhanced platform features (details to be shared upon joining). write clean, testable, and maintainable code that adheres to kinobi ai’s standards and best practices. design meaningful analytics and data pipelines, including ai-driven dashboards to monitor internal metrics and track strategic performance across products, regions, and teams. research and develop user-friendly ui for both mobile and web platforms, including potential ai-guided ux elements. qualifications: at least 3 years of experience as a full stack software engineer, ideally in fast-paced environments with exposure to ai/ml applications or data-driven systems. proficiency in node.js, express.js, and ui frameworks like vue.js, react.js, or similar — with 3+ years of hands-on experience building dynamic web apps (bonus if you’ve worked with ai components or llm apis). strong experience with mongodb or similar databases — especially in designing schemas to support ai models, analytics, and high-volume data queries. solid understanding of the software development lifecycle — particularly for web applications with ai modules or apis (e.g., openai, hugging face, langchain, etc.). comfortable using git and collaborating on repositories involving ml engineers or data scientists. ability to manage both technical and ai/ml-enhanced tasks effectively, from ideation to deployment. enjoy working on technically simple but contextually complex tasks, especially those involving ai user guidance or behavior prediction. strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with curiosity to explore how ai can solve real education problems. excellent oral, written, and interpersonal communication skills — including technical writing and documenting ai models or apis. ability to work independently and in a remote, cross-functional team environment. previous experience in fast-paced vuca environments (e.g., startups, ai labs, or tech consultancies). experience working as a freelancer or contractor on ai-driven or highly customized projects, with a strong understanding of user pain points. fluent in english, both written and spoken. bonus: experience working closely with founders or product teams in b2b saas companies building global products. bonus: strong desire to build a global standard ai company from southeast asia. bonus: background in software houses or agencies that require continuous product iteration and close client alignment — similar to how kinobi ai operates. why join us? work on a meaningful ai-powered product that’s transforming the future of education and impacting millions of students across southeast asia and beyond. be part of a fast-growing company with founders who deeply care about your professional and personal growth — and who are committed to building with purpose and intelligence. get ownership and flexibility to shape how the tech + ai team grows and scales — from roadmap to architectural decisions. additional information: all interviews and communication will be conducted in english. only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

description_text: kesempatan pt sutandi jaya sejahtera, sebuah perusahaan manufaktur dan logistik terkemuka di surabaya, jawa timur, sedang mencari seorang ppic (production planning and inventory control) engineer yang berpengalaman untuk bergabung dengan tim kami. dalam peran ini, anda akan memegang peran penting dalam mengoptimalkan proses produksi dan kontrol persediaan demi mendukung pertumbuhan bisnis perusahaan. tanggung jawab mengembangkan dan mengelola rencana produksi berdasarkan permintaan pelanggan dan kapasitas pabrik. memantau dan mengontrol level persediaan bahan baku, barang dalam proses, dan barang jadi untuk menjamin kelancaran produksi. menganalisis data produksi dan persediaan untuk mengidentifikasi peluang perbaikan dan efisiensi. berkoordinasi dengan tim produksi, pembelian, dan logistik untuk memastikan aliran material yang lancar. mengembangkan dan menerapkan sistem dan prosedur ppic yang efektif. menyiapkan laporan produksi, persediaan, dan analisis varians secara berkala. persyaratan sarjana teknik industri atau bidang terkait. minimal 3 tahun pengalaman sebagai ppic engineer atau peran serupa di industri manufaktur. mahir menggunakan perangkat lunak ppic dan erp. kemampuan analitis yang kuat dan pemikiran kritis untuk mengidentifikasi dan menyelesaikan masalah. pengetahuan tentang metode produksi, kontrol persediaan, dan manajemen rantai pasokan. kemampuan komunikasi yang baik, baik secara lisan maupun tertulis. kemampuan bekerja di bawah tekanan dan dengan deadline yang ketat. manfaat gaji kompetitif sesuai dengan pengalaman anda. tunjangan kesehatan dan asuransi jiwa yang komprehensif. kesempatan untuk pengembangan karier melalui pelatihan dan program rotasi. lingkungan kerja yang kolaboratif dan mendukung. paket cuti dan tunjangan yang menarik. tentang kami pt sutandi jaya sejahtera adalah pemimpin pasar dalam industri manufaktur dan logistik di indonesia. didirikan pada tahun 1990, perusahaan kami telah tumbuh menjadi salah satu produsen terkemuka di bidangnya, dikenal karena komitmennya terhadap kualitas, inovasi, dan pelayanan pelanggan yang unggul. kami memiliki tim yang berdedikasi, didukung oleh fasilitas produksi modern, dan menerapkan praktik terbaik dalam operasi rantai pasokan. jika anda tertarik untuk bergabung dengan tim kami yang dinamis, lamar sekarang!

description_text: position overview: this role is responsible for developing, maintaining, and optimizing process control systems that support safe, reliable, and efficient mineral processing operations at the round mountain gold mine. this position focuses on improving plant stability, throughput, recovery, and equipment performance through effective control strategies, automation enhancements, and close collaboration with the operations, metallurgy, and maintenance teams. key responsibilities: design, implement, and optimize control strategies across all plant circuits (crushing, grinding, leaching) to enhance stability and metallurgical performance. configure, troubleshoot, and support dcs, plc, and hmi/scada platforms to ensure high system availability and operational reliability. develop and tune regulatory and advanced control loops to improve process throughput, mineral recovery, and reagent efficiency. partner with metallurgy and operations teams to identify process constraints and implement proactive automation solutions for risk mitigation. collaborate with the maintenance superintendent to support instrumentation reliability, hardware integrity, and control network performance. provide high-level technical support and conduct root cause analysis (rca) for complex process upsets or control system failures. ensure all control systems adhere to safe operating limits, critical safeguards, and site management of change (moc) procedures. lead automation-related capital projects, including functional specifications, fat/sat documentation, and commissioning for continuous improvement. qualifications: minimum senior high school (sma/smk) qualification. 5–8 years of experience in process control or automation within mineral processing, mining, or heavy industrial environments. familiarity with cmms (computerized maintenance management system). hands-on experience with dcs and/or plc platforms commonly used in mining operations (e.g., honeywell, abb, emerson, rockwell). strong understanding of mineral processing unit operations and their specific control requirements. expertise in control loop tuning, alarm management, and control system troubleshooting. experience using process data analysis and visualization tools (e.g., wonderware, pi system, or equivalent historians). instrumentation fundamentals, including flow, level, pressure, density, and analytical measurements. familiarity with advanced process control (apc) concepts is preferre   important notice:  masmindo dwi area does not charge any fees at any stage of the recruitment process and does not require the use of specific travel agents for transportation or accommodation. any claims or requests to the contrary should be considered fraudulent.

description_text: gambaran umum pekerjaan pt golden great borneo, perusahaan pertambangan terkemuka di indonesia, mencari seorang  mine plan engineer  yang berpengalaman untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di lahat, sumatera selatan. dalam peran ini, anda akan memainkan peran kunci dalam merencanakan dan mengoptimalkan operasi penambangan kami, berkontribusi secara langsung pada efisiensi dan keberhasilan keseluruhan bisnis kami. tanggung jawab utama mengembangkan rencana tambang jangka pendek, menengah, dan panjang yang selaras dengan tujuan produksi perusahaan. melakukan analisis dan pemodelan geologi, topografi, dan data operasional lainnya untuk membuat rencana penambangan yang optimal. mengidentifikasi dan mengevaluasi peluang untuk meningkatkan efisiensi operasi dan produktivitas. berkoordinasi dengan tim teknis lainnya, seperti geolog, surveyor, dan operator tambang, untuk memastikan pelaksanaan rencana tambang yang efektif. memantau dan melaporkan kemajuan rencana tambang, mengidentifikasi tantangan, dan mengusulkan solusi yang tepat. memastikan kepatuhan terhadap peraturan lingkungan, keselamatan, dan peraturan pemerintah yang berlaku. keterampilan, kualifikasi, dan pengalaman yang dibutuhkan gelar sarjana dalam teknik pertambangan, geologi, atau bidang terkait. minimal 2 tahun pengalaman sebagai mine plan engineer di industri pertambangan. pemahaman yang mendalam tentang proses perencanaan tambang, termasuk pemodelan, optimasi, dan penjadwalan. kemampuan untuk menganalisis dan menginterpretasikan data geologi, survei, dan operasional. pengetahuan tentang perangkat lunak perencanaan tambang seperti surpac, minesched, atau perangkat lunak serupa. kemampuan untuk bekerja dalam tim dan berkolaborasi dengan berbagai pemangku kepentingan. kemampuan komunikasi yang baik, kemampuan analitis, dan pemecahan masalah yang kuat. manfaat utama perusahaan paket kompensasi yang kompetitif, termasuk gaji yang menarik dan tunjangan yang komprehensif. kesempatan untuk pengembangan karier dengan program pelatihan dan pengembangan profesional yang kuat. budaya perusahaan yang mendukung keseimbangan kehidupan-kerja, dengan fleksibilitas dan opsi kerja jarak jauh. lingkungan kerja yang dinamis dan kolaboratif di lingkungan industri pertambangan yang sedang berkembang. tentang pt golden great borneo pt golden great borneo adalah perusahaan pertambangan terdepan di indonesia yang berfokus pada eksplorasi dan produksi bahan tambang. kami berkomitmen untuk menjalankan bisnis kami dengan cara yang bertanggung jawab secara lingkungan dan sosial. dengan didukung oleh tim profesional yang berdedikasi, kami terus berinovasi dan memanfaatkan teknologi mutakhir untuk mencapai standar kinerja tertinggi. bergabung dengan kami berarti menjadi bagian dari organisasi yang dinamis, ambisius, dan berorientasi pada pertumbuhan. tertarik untuk bergabung dengan tim kami? lamar sekarang untuk peran  mine plan engineer  yang menantang ini!

description_text:
job description: 
 we are seeking a data analyst who will serve as a key thinking partner for our business stakeholders and product management teams across of our business and product domains. in this role, you will leverage data to drive insights, support decision-making, and provide actionable recommendations that will shape the direction of our products and business strategies. some of the key responsibilities that you will have are: 
 
 database: design, test, and collaborate with relevant parties (e.g product engineering, data engineering) to enable, extract, or enrich data/data pipeline. 
 reporting: design, build, and disseminate dashboards or other self-served data products to enable stakeholders get quick business performance, conduct data exploration, or derive quick insights. 
 analysis: design, perform, and disseminate descriptive or diagnostic analyses with valuable findings and actionable insights to better understand the business. 
 experimentation: design, analyze, and disseminate experiments or causal-impact studies to test multiple hypotheses, variants, or initiatives and infer the best result(s) based on relevant success metrics. 
 modeling: design, develop, and collaborate with relevant parties (e.g product engineering, machine learning engineer, data scientist) to deploy supervised or unsupervised models as per business needs to optimize business performance. 
 
 job requirements: 
 
 several openings are available across multiple domains and levels 
 bachelor/master's degree majoring in statistics, mathematics, physics, computers/informatics, engineering, economics, or equivalent 
 good communication, presentation, and storytelling skills to deliver data-inspired findings, also passionate in data, analysis, or insights with high curiosity character. 
 3+ years of full time data analyst experience (open for prior experience in scientist and engineerr). 
 3+ years of hands-on experience with sql, spreadsheet, and r/python. 
 3+ years of dashboarding experience with bi or dataviz tools (tableau, looker studio, domo etc.). 
 prior experience in conducting statistical experimentation or a/b testing is a plus. 
 prior experience in developing unsupervised/supervised models is a plus. 
 prior experience in working on cloud platforms (gcp, aws, azure, etc.) is a plus.
requirements: A/B Testing, AWS, Actionable Insights, Analysis Design, Azure, Bi, Business Needs, Business Stakeholders, Business Strategies, Cloud Platforms, Computers, Conducting, Dashboarding, Dashboards, Data Analysis, Data Analyst, Data Engineering, Data Exploration, Data Pipeline, Data Scientist, Database Design, Decision Making, Diagnostic, Direction, Disseminate, Domains, Economics, Engineer, Experimentation, Extract, Findings, GCP, Impact, Informatics, Initiatives, Looker, Machine Learning, Master, Mathematics, Modeling, Models, Multiple, Optimize, Partner, Performance, Physics, Pipeline Reporting, Presentation, Product Engineering, Product Management, Python 3, R, Recommendations, SQL, Serve, Served, Shape, Spreadsheet, Statistical, Statistics, Storytelling, Studio, Success Metrics, Supervised, Tableau, Exp: 3+ years

description_text:
job description 
 we are seeking a high-caliber data analyst who will serve as a key thinking partner to the business. our focus is on growing a sustainable lending business by providing our customers with a responsible and convenient form of credit. in this role, you will partner closely with the product, fraud‑investigation, and engineering teams to detect, investigate, and prevent fraudulent activity in various stages of paylater business, delivering actionable insights to help drive critical business decisions. if you’re a team player with a passion for data and analytics, we’d love to have you on board! 
 our techstack: bigquery, dbt, python, github, tableau, looker studio, google cloud build,  
 main responsibilities 
 
 understand paylater business, customer behaviour and fraud in lending and ota settings 
 collaborate closely with pm and fraud investigation teams to monitor fraudulent behaviour, uncover emerging fraud schemes/attacker personas, translate insights into new features, score‑card updates, or prevention rules/models. present findings clearly through written narratives, documents, dashboards and during stakeholder discussions. 
 conduct a/b and back‑testing to evaluate new detection concepts 
 develop dashboards and alerts not just for monitoring, but to produce actionable insights that decision makers can use to steer the business. 
 develop etl pipelines within a robust framework that is highly automated and does not require a large team to maintain and monitor 
 
 qualifications 
 
 2-5 years of experience in analytics with at least a bachelor's degree in a quantitative field. 
 proficiency in sql and data visualization tools (e.g. tableau, looker, power bi). 
 strong skills in python or r for data analysis and modeling 
 experience with a/b testing and experiment design. 
 excellent communication skills to convey complex analyses to non-technical stakeholders. 
 ability to translate business problems into analytical solutions and actionable recommendations. 
 ability to build classification, anomaly‑detection, and time‑series models 
 familiarity with common fraud vectors (cashout fraud, identity theft, account takeover, synthetic identity etc). experience in fintech industries/consumer lending business is preferred.  
 proficiency in bahasa (preferred)
requirements: A/B Testing, Account, Actionable Insights, Activity, Alerts, Analytical, Analytics, Anomaly Detection, Automated, Bigquery, Board, Business Decisions, Caliber, Card, Classification, Cloud Build, Concepts, Credit, Customer, Customers, Dashboards, Data Analysis, Data Analysis And Modeling, Data Analyst, Data Visualization, Delivering, Detect, Documents, Engineering, Etl, Evaluate, Excellent Communication, Experiment Design, Fintech, Focus, Framework, Fraud Investigation, Github, Google Cloud, Help, Identity, Investigate, Lending, Looker, Main, Models, Monitoring, New Features, Partner, Personas, Power Bi, Present Findings, Prevention, Produce, Python, Quantitative, R, Recommendations, Require, Rules, SQL, Serve, Settings, Stakeholders, Studio, Tableau, Team Player, Time Series, Updates, Vectors, Exp: 2-5 years

your main responsibilities include, but are not limited to: collaborate with healthcare stakeholders (doctors, administrators, it teams) to gather and document business needs for his modules (emr, billing, pharmacy, labs, etc.). translate requirements into functional specifications, workflows, and system configurations. lead end-to-end his deployment—install, configure, test, and train users. resolve system issues, optimize performance, and ensure compliance with healthcare standards (hl7, hipaa, etc.). liaise between clients and technical teams to ensure seamless delivery. follows established policies and practices for implementation services. ensures milestones and deliverables for all assigned projects are completed according to plans. tracks and analyzes the status of projects and provides regular project reports. builds and maintains strong relationships with customers by understanding their needs, communicating effectively and ensuring that we deliver value. may assist in development of technical project estimates, scope analysis, and technical documentation. maintain team communication daily (daily/ad-hoc, weekly, monthly) provide post-go-live support and create training materials. education and experience requirement: bachelor’s degree in  healthcare it, computer science, business administration , or related field minimum 1 recent year technology implementor experience related to packaged business applications familiar with create documentation for project (fsd / tsd / brd, mom, etc) bachelor’s degree in  healthcare it, computer science, business administration , or related field understanding in  hospital business  experience preferably why join us? impactful work improving  patient care through technology . career growth in a fast-evolving  healthtech  industry. if you feel that you can meet the qualification and up for the challenge, please send your complete resume and current color photograph by clicking button bellow

description_text: hiring - business strategy analyst/ data analyst kami mencari business strategy analyst / data analyst yang memiliki ketajaman bisnis di industri fintech/banking untuk mengelola, menganalisis, dan menyajikan narasi strategis dari ekosistem payment channel (edc, qris, atm/crm) dan branchless banking. peran ini bertanggung jawab mengubah data transaksi mentah menjadi insight profitabilitas dan rekomendasi pertumbuhan bisnis. key responsibilities * performance monitoring: mengelola laporan rutin kinerja edc, qris, atm dan produk perbankan lainnya dengan fokus pada sales volume, transaction growth, dan casa. * profitability analysis: melakukan pemetaan struktur biaya (fbi) secara presisi, dan skema mdr. * agent segmenting & dynamics: menganalisis pergerakan status merchant dan agen, menggunakan transition matrix. * technical mapping: melakukan pemetaan teknis akseptasi pembayaran, termasuk identifikasi issuer melalui nns/bin dan logika routing nss (network switching system). * strategic narrative: menyusun laporan eksekutif dan publikasi data profesional yang menjelaskan fenomena bisnis (seperti hubungan edc vs qris atau efisiensi crm maupun potensi pengembangan produk seperti fitur relasi di brilink dan digital product). technical qualifications * expert in sql: mahir menulis complex query, cte, dan pemrosesan data besar di lingkungan big-data. * sql dan dashboard tools * financial literacy: memahami konsep bc ratio, fee-based income, interchange fee, dan supply chain financing. * excel mastery: mahir dalam pemodelan data tingkat lanjut dan otomatisasi laporan. domain expertise (preferred) * memahami ekosistem perbankan mikro dan ultra mikro (holding umi, pnm, qris). * familiar dengan protokol transaksi perbankan (iso 8583) dan alur transaksi on-us/off-us. * memahami ekosistem digital merchant (brimerchant) dan produk ritel perbankan (skema acquiring). soft skills * analytical thinking: mampu menemukan "anomali" dalam data dan mencari penyebabnya (root cause analysis). * professional communication: mampu menjelaskan data teknis ke dalam bahasa bisnis yang sederhana dan efektif.
requirements: Agent, Analytical Thinking, Anomali, Banking, Big Data, Business Strategy, CRM, Complex Query, Dashboard, Data Analyst, Digital, Domain, Dynamics, Excel, Expert, Financial Literacy, Financing, Fintech, Growth, Hiring, Mapping, Narrative, Network Switching, Payment, Performance Monitoring, Profitability Analysis, Root Cause, Root Cause Analysis, Routing, SQL, Sales, Segmenting, Status, Supply Chain, System, Transition

description_text: tugas & tanggung jawab inventory analyst : mengelola proses stock transfer order (sto) di sistem sap mulai dari penerimaan permintaan cabang, pembuatan sto, hingga monitoring pengiriman dan penanganan pembatalan transaksi melakukan monitoring dan rekonsiliasi stok melalui proses stock taking berkala, termasuk analisa selisih antara data sistem dan kondisi fisik di cabang, dan mengelola  event national stock take  per 6 bulan mengelola proses distribusi dan replenishment stok berdasarkan kebutuhan cabang, termasuk permintaan urgent, mrp, dan minimum stock level. reduce dead stock melalui perencanaan yg terukur dan sistematis melakukan analisa data penjualan dan pergerakan stok untuk menentukan kebutuhan pengadaan dan distribusi spare parts secara optimal melakukan alokasi stok terhadap sales order outstanding untuk memastikan ketersediaan barang dan mendukung proses penjualan mengelola dan memproses data mrp (material requirement planning) termasuk pembuatan purchase order serta koordinasi dengan pihak terkait menangani proses work order terkait assembly, disassembly, dan perubahan part number di sistem sap sesuai kebutuhan operasional dan permintaan customermelakukan analisa harga cost dan penyesuaian part number untuk memastikan kesesuaian antara kebutuhan customer dan ketersediaan part produk. berkoordinasi dengan cabang, depo, dan pihak terkait untuk memastikan kelancaran proses distribusi, penyimpanan, dan ketersediaan spare parts memastikan seluruh proses inventory berjalan sesuai dengan sop, akurat, dan terdokumentasi dengan baik di dalam sistem kualifikasi / requirements : pendidikan minimal d3/s1 jurusan teknik, logistik, supply chain, manajemen, atau bidang terkait memiliki pengalaman minimal 2–3 tahun di bidang inventory, warehouse, atau supply chain (wajib memiliki pengalaman di perusahaan alat berat) wajib menguasai, memahami, dan terbiasa menggunakan system sap mampu melakukan forecasting inventory dan replenishment stock memahami proses inventory management, stock control, dan distribusi barang memiliki kemampuan analisa data yang baik terkait pergerakan stok dan kebutuhan barang mampu bekerja secara detail, teliti, dan memiliki akurasi tinggi dalam pengolahan data memiliki kemampuan kerjasama tim, koordinasi dan komunikasi yang baik dengan tim internal maupun cabang terbiasa bekerja dengan deadline dan mampu mengelola prioritas pekerjaan mampu mengoperasikan microsoft excel (terutama untuk analisa data) dengan baik memiliki kemampuan problem solving yang baik dalam menangani kendala operasional inventory mampu bekerja secara sistematis, terstruktur, dan sesuai dengan sop yang berlaku
requirements: Analyst, Assembly, Customer, Forecasting, Inventory Management, Microsoft Excel, Monitoring, Planning, Problem Solving, Purchase Order, Reduce, Replenishment, SAP, Sales, Spare, Stock Control, Supply Chain, System, Transfer, Exp: 3 tahun

description_text: are you someone who enjoys working in an environment where data integrity, actionable insights, and strategic growth really matter? pt asuransi raksa pratikara is a trusted insurance company that continues to scale its digital systems. as our technology grows, so do the challenges — and that’s where you come in. we’re looking for a data analyst who’s curious, detail-oriented, and comfortable bridging the gap between raw numbers and business strategy. you’ll work hands-on with sql and visualization tools, monitor key performance metrics, uncover trends, and help strengthen our data-driven decision-making. this role is perfect for someone who likes digging into complex datasets, solving business problems, building dashboards, and constantly learning new analytical methods. your work will directly impact operational efficiency, risk assessment, and future business strategies. if you enjoy hands-on data storytelling, learning fast, and turning information into real business value, you’ll fit right in. what you’ll do: interpret complex datasets to analyze key metrics (e.g., sales trends, customer behavior, or operational costs) and provide actionable recommendations. design, build, and maintain self-serve dashboards using bi tools (power bi, tableau, or looker) to democratize data access. write and optimize sql queries. analyze historical data patterns to forecast future trends, seasonality, and the impact of business initiatives. validate data accuracy and consistency, working with engineering teams to resolve discrepancies in pipelines or source systems. identify manual reporting processes and automate them using sql, python, or other tools to improve efficiency. partner with non-technical stakeholders (managers, marketing, ops) to translate business questions into data requirements.. maintain clear documentation for data definitions, metrics logic, and reporting processes. communicate technical findings clearly to diverse audiences, ensuring insights lead to measurable business decisions. what we’re looking for: bachelor’s degree in mathematics, statistics, computer science, economics, or a related quantitative field. minimum 1–2 years of experience in data analysis, business intelligence, or a relevant role. strong mastery of sql (joins, window functions, ctes) is mandatory. proven experience creating interactive dashboards and reports using power bi, tableau, or qlik. advanced proficiency in excel/google sheets; basic knowledge of python or r for data manipulation is a strong plus. excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to explain complex data to non-technical teams. specific attention to detail, a proactive problem-solving attitude, and the ability to work in a fast-paced, agile environment.

description_text: about company at ennovi we harness the power of two megatrends - electrification and ai - to help industries innovate at speed, operate smarter, and achieve sustainable growth. by combining these transformative forces with our global reach and best talent, we empower our customers to lead their markets and drive sustainable progress. from automotive to aerospace, consumer electronics, data storage, industrial, and medical markets, we help our customers achieve these megatrends by creating smarter, safer, and more sustainable solutions. we excel in developing high-performance, custom solutions that meet diverse technical needs, solve unique challenges, optimize performance, and adapt to evolving market demands. our mission is to get customers to the future faster, from anywhere. headquartered in singapore, ennovi has a global presence across north america, europe, sea and china, where all its activities are socially responsible, with minimal environmental impact. learn more at  www.ennovi.com why join us at ennovi, we envision a future of electrification and innovation and strive to create an inspiring workplace where our employees are integral to shaping that future. we offer a dynamic, collaborative and inclusive culture that encourages continuous learning, professional growth, and a sense of purpose. as a part of the ennovi team, employees experience the excitement of being at the forefront of cutting-edge technologies and contributing to a sustainable future. our commitment to the transformation is epitomized by our five pillars: speed, innovation, best talent, global reach, and sustainability. this entails navigating exponential market changes through agile structures, fostering innovation across all aspects of our business, strategically expanding our global footprint, championing sustainability initiatives and nurturing a winning team. privacy policy ennovi is an equal opportunity employer in conformance with objectives. what you'll be doing conducting research and analysis to create the concept of new products. designing and prototyping mechanical components and systems. evaluating the test and design result, and redesigning until the product is ready to be manufactured. analyzing design requirements, constraints, and specifications to ensure optimal performance and functionality. preparing and analytical skills. effective communication and teamwork skills to collaborate with cross-functional teams. ability to work independently and manage multiple projects simultaneously. what we offer for professional development and career growth. our company culture values innovation, collaboration, and work-life balance, making us an attractive employer for talented individuals like yourself. apply now!

description_text: excelitas® is a leading provider of advanced, life-enriching technologies that make a difference, serving global market leaders in the life sciences, advanced industrial, next-generation semiconductor and avionics end markets. headquartered in pittsburgh, pa, usa, excelitas is an essential partner in the design, development and manufacture of advanced technologies, offering leading-edge innovation in sensing, detection, imaging, optics and specialty illumination for customers worldwide. excelitas is at the forefront of addressing many of the relevant megatrends impacting the world today, including precision medicine, industrial automation, artificial intelligence, and connected devices (iot). our facility in batam, indonesia specializes in the production of lighting and detection product technologies including our specialty lamps for industrial and photonics applications, ipl lamps and trigger coils, as well as infra-red detectors (ird), sensor modules and pyro-electric ceramic wafers. operating since september 1994, this site is also responsible for manufacturing of our thermopile sensors (tps), thermopile modules (tpm), ccd sensors and printed circuit board assemblies. we are presently seeking a  facilities engineer  who will be responsible for planning, implementing, and improving facility maintenance activities to ensure that buildings and infrastructure are safe, compliant, and fully functional to support business operations effectively. key responsibilities plan and manage maintenance of building equipment and infrastructure. design equipment specifications to meet building and operational requirements. coordinate with suppliers/vendors for maintenance, construction, repairs, and related activities. supervise construction progress and contractor work, ensuring compliance with safety, environmental standards, timelines, costs, and contractual obligations. assess utilities and operational setups to optimize efficiency. develop and implement action plans for continuous improvement and resource efficiency. prepare facility reports and maintain compliance documentation. lead and implement building safety and environmental programs and initiatives. provide training to junior staff on facility operations and compliance requirements. coordinate and conduct preventive maintenance for facility equipment on a regular basis. investigate equipment failures, perform repairs, and recommend improvements. manage building management system (bms) implementation. monitor and report utilities and energy consumption regularly. ensure adherence to quality, environmental, health, and safety management systems within the area of responsibility. qualifications diploma or degree in mechanical, electrical, or industrial engineering (or related field). minimum 3–5 years of experience in facility engineering or maintenance management. strong knowledge of hvac, utilities management, and preventive maintenance practices. familiarity with building management systems (bms) and energy efficiency programs. strong leadership, problem-solving and analytical skills. good english communication skill (written and spoken) skilled in project management and trained qms and ehsms related standard will be an added advantage.

description_text: job description 1. business needs assessment (30%) • identify ai opportunities across departments (commercials, production, qc, qa, supply chain, and enablers) • conduct stakeholder interviews to understand pain points and requirements • translate business needs into technical requirements • prioritize ai initiatives based on roi / rov and feasibility 2. ul unidata coordination & alignment (25%) • collaborate with ul unidata team on ai strategy and initiatives • align local ai solution selection with group-level standards and roadmap • participate in ul unidata ai governance forums and knowledge sharing • leverage group-negotiated ai tools and enterprise agreements • report local ai needs and implementation progress to unidata 3. solution sourcing & evaluation (20%) • research and evaluate ready-to-use ai tools/saas platforms in the market • coordinate with unidata on approved vendor lists and preferred solutions • conduct vendor demos and proof-of-concept trials • perform cost-benefit analysis and vendor comparison • recommend ai solutions aligned with both local needs and group strategy 4. vendor & partnership management (20%) • negotiate contracts and licensing with ai vendors (in coordination with ul unidata) • manage relationships with 3rd party ai providers • ensure vendor compliance with company security and regulatory standards • coordinate local implementation support from vendors 5. implementation & adoption (5%) • work with it infrastructure team for system integration • coordinate user training and change management • monitor adoption and gather user feedback • report implementation progress to local management and unidata job requirements min. bachelor's degree of information technology or related majors. microsoft: excel, words, powerpoint. fluent in english; both writing and speaking. minimum 2 years of experience in ai, data analytics, or digital transformation roles. proven experience conducting business or ai needs assessments and aligning solutions with strategy hands-on experience in evaluating and managing vendors (local and/or global) demonstrated experience in implementing or deploying ai/data-driven solutions end-to-end

description_text: pt. noya sukses selalu' sedang mencari seorang it engineer yang berpengalaman dan berdedikasi untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di area pik 2, kab. tangerang. sebagai it engineer, anda akan memiliki peran strategis dalam memastikan kelancaran operasional sistem dan jaringan teknologi informasi di perusahaan kami. job summary: it engineer bertanggung jawab untuk memastikan seluruh sistem teknologi dalam bisnis perusahaan berjalan lancar, stabil, dan mampu mendukung pengalaman pengguna (user experience) yang optimal, termasuk sistem ticketing, event system, platform digital, dll. tanggung jawab utama: mengkonfigurasi, memelihara, dan memantau sistem, perangkat, dan jaringan komputer perusahaan untuk menjamin kinerja yang optimal, dan menjamin kelancaran sistem saat high traffic. mengantisipasi, mendiagnosa, mengidentifikasi, dan menyelesaikan masalah-masalah teknis (seperti downtime saat event, dan masalah lainnya) yang terkait dengan infrastruktur it. mengimplementasikan dan memperbarui solusi keamanan untuk melindungi sistem dan data dari ancaman siber. memberikan dukungan dan pelatihan teknis kepada divisi terkait. mengembangkan dan menerapkan prosedur, kebijakan, dokumentasi, dan pengembangan teknologi bisnis perusahaan. berkolaborasi dengan tim kreatif, marketing, dan operasional event keterampilan, kualifikasi, dan pengalaman yang dibutuhkan: gelar diploma atau sarjana dalam bidang teknologi informasi, teknik komputer/computer science, atau disiplin ilmu yang terkait. memahami artificial intelligence (kecerdasan buatan) dan perkembangannya,  dan wajib memiliki ai certificate (it specialist-ai) dari institusi yang kredibel,  serta   memiliki sertifikasi it lainnya yang relevan. berpengalaman sedikitnya 8 tahun sebagai it engineer, it specialist atau peran teknis it yang setara, dengan tambahan pengalaman di industri digital/entertainment lebih disukai. memahami cybersecurity awareness, ticketing system dan payment integration. menguasai pengelolaan network dan server, dan infrastruktur dari web dan app. memiliki kemampuan problem-solving yang kuat, dan berpengalaman menangani sistem dengan traffic tinggi (high concurrency). kemampuan yang mahir dalam konfigurasi, pemeliharaan, dan troubleshooting perangkat keras dan perangkat lunak komputer. pengetahuan yang mendalam tentang jaringan, keamanan siber, dan manajemen sistem informasi. kemampuan komunikasi yang baik, baik tertulis maupun lisan. jika anda tertarik untuk bergabung dengan tim kami yang dinamis, lamar sekarang!
