description_text: job summary: datalec precision installations (dpi) is a leading provider of data centre design, supply, build, and managed services. we are committed to delivering seamless and integrated solutions for data centre operators worldwide. our team is dedicated to maintaining high standards of service and excellence in every project we undertake. we are seeking a project engineer to join our team.  this role will oversee the engineering execution and site coordination of structured cabling infrastructure for hyperscale and enterprise data center projects across the apac region. this role bridges engineering design and field implementation, ensuring quality, schedule, and cost targets are met—while promoting the use of ai-enabled construction platforms to optimize design validation, material tracking, and installation workflows.   core duties & responsibilities ·       manage end-to-end project engineering activities including review of ifc drawings, site coordination, and as-built documentation. ·       provide technical guidance on copper/fiber cabling systems, containment routing, patch panel layouts, and rack configurations. ·       review shop drawings, cable schedules, and rfis to ensure alignment with project requirements and industry standards (tia/eia, bicsi). ·       utilize ai-based site capture tools (e.g., openspace, buildots, disperse) for real-time installation tracking, deviation detection, and qa verification. ·       support ai-assisted cable routing validation and digital twin modeling using bim platforms with structured cabling plugins. ·       apply ai analytics and dashboards to monitor productivity, forecast risks, and identify performance issues across projects. ·       coordinate with general contractors, mep trades, and ict vendors to align structured cabling scope with overall project timeline and milestones. ·       support site supervisors in managing cable pulling, termination, testing, and labeling activities in accordance with method statements. ·       conduct site walks, inspections, and technical meetings to drive issue resolution and maintain construction quality. ·       material & progress management ·       oversee materials take-off, procurement tracking, and inventory management using digital tools. ·       ensure timely submission and approval of documentation, including test reports, handover packages, and redlines. ·       update project trackers and contribute to client reports on engineering and site progress. ·       represent the business, upholding our core values and behaviours with all internal and external customers, clients and third parties, ·       maintain business and client confidentiality, adhering to applicable data protection regulations and information security standards in line with company, and group policies and procedures.  qualifications: skills and experience ·       bachelor’s degree in electrical engineering, telecommunications, or related field. ·       3–6 years of experience in structured cabling system implementation, preferably in data center or mission-critical environments. ·       strong understanding of tia, iso/iec cabling standards, and hands-on knowledge of fiber optics, copper systems, and cable testing procedures. ·       proficient in autocad; familiarity with revit, bim 360, and construction analytics platforms is a plus. ·       experience or interest in ai tools for construction monitoring, routing optimization, or material forecasting. ·       excellent problem-solving, communication, and stakeholder coordination skills. ·       willingness to travel regionally within apac. preferred certifications: ·       bicsi rcdd or technician certification ·       pmp or equivalent project coordination training ·       training in ai/digital tools for construction (e.g., openspace, autodesk ai, disperse) values & behaviours:   dpi values                                           dedication                precision                   integrity  behaviours   ·       inspiration -  has a clear vision of where to go and the ability to articulate it. empowers people to implement our vision and strategy. great communicator who captures the imagination, generating trust and commitment.   ·       team spirit -  thinks about "we" not "me"; we do this together. brings purpose to the team to make it a cohesive unit. knows when to seek help and when to give it. prepared to take action to address issues for the good of the team and celebrate others' successes.   ·       self-awareness -  emotionally intelligent; has empathy for others and gets the best out of people by meeting them on their terms. great at building rapport with colleagues and customers; knows that their behavior impacts on the performance of others and adapts approach to achieve the best results.  ·       achievement -  always striving to be the best and consistently delivers. high performer: bringing high energy, competence and making the right decisions to get things done.  ·       tenacity -  relentless in the pursuit of their goals. excellent at solving problems and overcoming obstacles; seeing the challenges before others see them and taking action, to avoid them becoming problems. sees setbacks as opportunities and becomes stronger in adversity.  ·       influence -  highly skilled at getting others committed to the goal. confident, enthusiastic and encourages creativity. understands the needs of stakeholders and as a result, engages them.   our vision   ·      to compete at the highest standards in data centre fit-out, mep construction and managed services throughout europe and beyond.   our mission ·      continue to develop and deliver products and services unparalleled in terms of quality. ·      retain our clients, broaden our breadth of service identifying closely with their changing requirements. ·      execute a robust h&s and wellbeing strategy.  consider and implement wherever possible initiatives that relate to environmental improvements.   our strategy   ·       people -  build an organisation capable of managing the business we will become.  recruit and retain and develop the best industry professionals.  health, safety and wellbeing remain paramount, for our employees and clients. ·       products -  must address an industry need. we must have differentiators such as assured quality, modularisation, and off-site construction techniques. datalec’s commitment to quality is unsurpassed in the industry, we seek perfection.  new products and services must be delivered to the same exacting standards. ·       purpose -  relates both to our clients and our organisation. we need to understand both how to be able to confidently present our solutions and product strategy to the market. separately, we create a working environment that promotes and rewards employees fairly, actively supporting a culture of transparency and mutual respect.

or  temperature controller in commercial refrigerator  industry; client resources and social connections are preferred. • local citizen or permanent resident of the target country, familiar with local language, culture and business environment. • fluent in local official language and mainstream business languages; basic english communication skills are must. • high school or above; majors in marketing,  hvac tools or temperature controller in commercial refrigerator industry  background are preferred. • strong sales motivation, target-oriented, good communication, negotiation and customer development abilities; responsible and trustworthy. • proficient in basic office software and mobile office tools; valid driver's license, familiar with local traffic, able to adapt to frequent business trips. • no bad professional records; able to work independently and cooperate with the team.

job_title: Tencent Cloud- Big Data Migration Architect (Indonesia)
description_text:
business unit cloud & smart industries group (csig) is responsible for promoting the company's cloud and industry internet strategy. csig explores the interactions between users and industries to create innovative solutions for smart industries via technological advancements such as cloud, ai, and network security. while driving the digitalization of retail, medical, education, transportation and other industries, csig helps companies serve users in smarter ways, building a new ecosystem of intelligent industries that connect users and businesses.
 what the role entails 
 1. migration architecture design & hands-on implementation: 
 design architecture migration solutions for public cloud customers. focus on deep technical implementation for migrating overseas mainstream stacks (bigquery, databricks, snowflake, etc.) to tencent cloud wedata + dlc/emr (storage-compute separation architecture). deploy migration environments, execute data synchronization, and perform business cutovers on the front line. 
 2. end-to-end project management & delivery: take ownership of the overall project schedule, risk control, and technical solution governance. coordinate internal and external resources to overcome organizational and technical barriers, ensuring the successful final delivery of the migration project. 
 3. process assurance & technical support: act as the primary technical point of contact for troubleshooting and resolving complex issues during migration. ensure a fast and smooth transition to the cloud by managing data consistency, business continuity, and providing comprehensive technical guidance. 
 4. deep technical optimization: provide full-stack technical support, including but not limited to sql syntax automated conversion/rewriting, spark/flink operator tuning, and post-migration performance benchmarking. ensure that business performance on tencent cloud meets or exceeds expectations. 
 5. product-research collaboration & best practices: work closely with solution architects (sa) to professionally summarize and feed back real-world customer requirements, pain points, and tool defects. assist sas in refining migration roadmaps and co-authoring "best practice manuals" for migrating from overseas cloud platforms to tencent cloud. 
 who we look for 
 1. hardcore technical background: bachelor’s degree or above in computer science or related fields; 5+ years of experience in big data. proficient in at least one programming language (java, scala, or python) with strong coding skills and logic conversion capabilities. 
 2. overseas stack expertise: familiar with the architecture and use cases of at least one major product: bigquery, databricks, or snowflake. understand the differences between these and open-source ecosystems (spark, hive); cross-cloud migration experience is a plus. 
 3. system analysis & large-scale management: strong capability in system problem analysis and resolving complex architectural issues. proven experience in cluster performance tuning, troubleshooting, source code optimization, and version upgrades; experience managing large-scale clusters (1000+ nodes) is preferred. 
 4. migration delivery experience: extensive experience in big data migration implementation and management. master common migration workflows and methodologies for big data components. familiar with mainstream vendor platforms and a proven track record of delivering large-scale cloud migration projects (pb-level). 
 5. core component principles: deep understanding of the hadoop ecosystem, with source-code level or deep tuning experience in hdfs, yarn, spark, hive, flink, doris, iceberg/hudi, etc. capable of handling underlying compatibility issues in heterogeneous environments. 
 6. soft skills & professionalism: excellent customer service awareness, communication, and resource coordination skills. proactive, self-driven, and highly responsible. able to thrive under pressure in cross-cloud and overseas migration scenarios. 
 equal employment opportunity at tencent 
 as an equal opportunity employer, we firmly believe that diverse voices fuel our innovation and allow us to better serve our users and the community. we foster an environment where every employee of tencent feels supported and inspired to achieve individual and common goals.

description_text: the asset management specialist will work in the warehouse/distribution center in idc and handle computer assets and peripherals. typical duties include receiving, processing, and unpacking goods, signing for packages, preparing computer kits for distribution, updating inventory records, counting boxes, and reporting on basic troubleshooting of defective goods. uses and operates manual and electronic documents, files, and records (shipping accounts, bar-coding, inventory, monthly inventory reporting, electronic delivery logs, incoming shipments, etc.) to properly document activities, and provide material and reliable resources information. utilizes asset management tools such as bar code scanners to perform inventories. provides outstanding customer service by maintaining attention to detail, completing assigned work in a timely manner, and maintaining an efficient and effective work environment. performs other related duties as assigned to ensure the efficient and effective functioning of the asset management team. maintains a detailed and accurate log of all items shipped, received, or moved within the area of responsibility. receive goods at the datacenter requirements: good communication skills and strong learning skills. proficient with microsoft excel education: associate degree and above.

description_text: the opportunity a foreign businessman is building something ambitious and the leadership needs a sharp, resourceful partner to help make it happen. not someone who waits for instructions. someone who sees the bigger picture, digs into the details, and brings solutions to the table before being asked. this role is part strategist, part operator, part researcher. one day you might be mapping competitors for a new venture in turkey. next, you could be evaluating swiss banking options and presenting your top two picks with a clear recommendation. and yes, you will also make sure the calendar is airtight, the travel is seamless, and nothing slips through the cracks. if you are someone who is equal parts curious and organized, who can go from “big picture” thinking to “small detail” execution without missing a beat; keep reading. what you’ll do think & advise research new markets, competitors, and business opportunities across international geographies then distill your findings into sharp, decision-ready briefs. when leadership says “i need to open a business account in dubai,” you don’t just google it. you research the top options, compare them, assess the risks, and present 2 lean choices with a clear “why.” stay ahead of trends in business, technology, and relevant industries. leadership wants a partner who can teach them something new, not just follow orders. evaluate vendors, partners, and service providers with structured frameworks not just gut feeling. organize & execute own the calendar across multiple time zones, protect leadership’s time, resolve conflicts, and ensure every day is intentionally structured. manage email and communication flow: filter, prioritize, respond when appropriate, and surface what matters. prepare briefing materials, agendas, and meeting notes. attend key meetings to capture action items and ensure follow-through. coordinate complex international travel with contingency plans for when things inevitably change. track projects, deadlines, and deliverables using notion, trello, asana, or whatever tool gets the job done. support & anticipate manage personal logistics appointments, reservations, household coordination, vendor management with the same rigor you bring to business tasks. handle the unexpected: personal shopping, gift sourcing, family arrangements, last-minute pivots. anticipate needs before they are articulated. the best person in this role will solve problems that haven’t been noticed yet. who you are you have 5+ years of experience working closely with a founder, ceo, or senior executive ideally across multiple industries or geographies. you are an excellent researcher and communicator. you can take a messy, undefined question and return a clear, structured answer. you write and speak english fluently. your emails, reports, and presentations are polished and professional. you are genuinely tech-savvy: you live in tools like google workspace, microsoft 365, slack, notion, trello, and you pick up new platforms fast including ai-powered tools. you handle confidential information with absolute discretion. trust is non-negotiable. you have international awareness and are comfortable navigating different cultures, time zones, and regulatory landscapes. you are proactive, not reactive. you do not wait to be told what to do. you think ahead, flag risks, and bring options. you are comfortable with flexible hours. this is a role that matches the pace of an entrepreneur, not a 9-to-5 office. tools you should be comfortable with productivity: google workspace (docs, sheets, calendar, drive), microsoft 365 (outlook, word, excel, powerpoint, teams). communication: slack, microsoft teams, whatsapp business, zoom/google meet. project & task management: notion, trello, etc, or similar. research & ai: comfortable using ai tools (chatgpt, claude, perplexity, etc.) to accelerate research and analysis. travel & logistics: familiarity with travel booking platforms, visa processing, and expense management tools. why you’ll love this you will not be stuck in a cubicle managing someone’s inbox. you will be at the center of an entrepreneur’s world shaping how decisions get made, how new ventures launch, and how a growing international business operates day to day. every week will look different. if that excites you, we should talk.

description_text: we are seeking a visionary and commercially astute chief technology officer to join our senior leadership team. in this pivotal role, you will drive the technology strategy that underpins our consulting services, accelerates digital transformation for our clients, and builds scalable internal capabilities that keep us at the forefront of the industry. as cto, you will bridge the gap between business strategy and technology execution — both within our firm and in the advisory work we deliver to clients across industries key responsibilities: technology strategy & vision ▸     define and own the firm-wide technology roadmap, aligning it with business growth objectives and client service delivery. ▸     identify emerging technologies (ai/ml, cloud, automation) and assess their impact on consulting service lines. ▸     champion digital innovation, positioning the firm as a technology-forward advisory partner. client engagement & delivery ▸     serve as the senior technology advisor on high-value client engagements, providing strategic guidance on digital transformation, architecture, and tech due diligence. ▸     lead or oversee technology workstreams within complex, multi-disciplinary consulting projects. ▸     build trusted relationships with c-suite client stakeholders, translating business challenges into technology solutions. internal technology & operations ▸     oversee the firm's internal technology infrastructure, tools, and data platforms. ▸     drive adoption of ai-powered tools and automation to enhance internal productivity and knowledge management. ▸     ensure cybersecurity, data governance, and compliance with relevant regulations (iso 27001, gdpr, etc.). people & organizational leadership ▸     build, mentor, and lead a high-performing technology team across engineering, architecture, and data functions. ▸     foster a culture of continuous learning, innovation, and engineering excellence. ▸     collaborate cross-functionally with practice leads, hr, and operations to embed technology capabilities across the firm. commercial & financial accountability ▸     own the technology budget and drive cost-effective vendor and partner management. ▸     contribute to business development — including proposals, pitches, and thought leadership — to grow the firm's technology advisory revenue. ▸     support the development of new technology-driven service offerings and go-to-market strategies. qualifications & experience required ▸     15+ years of progressive technology leadership experience, with at least 5 years in a cto, vp engineering, or equivalent executive role. ▸     proven experience in a management consulting, professional services, or advisory environment. ▸     deep expertise in digital transformation, enterprise architecture, and emerging technologies. ▸     strong track record of engaging c-suite stakeholders and translating strategy into execution. ▸     demonstrated ability to build and lead cross-functional technology teams in a fast-paced environment. ▸     bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, information technology, or related field. preferred ▸     mba or advanced degree in a technical or business discipline. ▸     experience working with private equity, investment banks, or large-scale enterprise clients. ▸     published thought leadership, speaking engagements, or industry recognitions. ▸     certifications in cloud platforms (aws, azure, gcp) or enterprise architecture frameworks (togaf). core competencies: technical • cloud & infrastructure (aws / azure / gcp) • enterprise architecture & systems design • ai, ml & data engineering • cybersecurity & risk management • agile, devops & product delivery leadership &  business • executive communication & stakeholder influence • strategic thinking & business acumen • team building & talent development • commercial development & proposal writing • change management & transformation

description_text: job summary: datalec precision installations (dpi) is a leading provider of data centre design, supply, build, and managed services. we are committed to delivering seamless and integrated solutions for data centre operators worldwide. our team is dedicated to maintaining high standards of service and excellence in every project we undertake. we are seeking a pmo administrator to join our team.  this role supports the senior project manager and project teams, you will play a crucial role in providing coordination and support to operational teams. your responsibilities will encompass various aspects, including documentation management, system administration, stakeholder relations, and organisational support.  core duties & responsibilities   collaborate with the management team to fulfil internal reporting requirements, ensuring accuracy and quality of data, within the dedicated deadlines. assist the senior project lead to maintain and monitor business as usual (bau) project schedules. track work hours, budgets, and expenditures. facilitate customer invoicing processes. support management teams with administration tasks as and when required, including organising training, maintaining project records, timesheet collation. communicating with project stakeholders to ensure the project needs are met. assist with purchase order processing and tender activities and bid-operational tenders. coordinate system file structures and permissions within sharepoint. provide support on systems such as salesforce, eque2, and sharepoint to navigate management system environments. ensure that health and safety documentation, project records and training are up to date. record meeting minutes and follow up on action items. contribute towards identifying and helping drive performance, implementation of savings opportunities, and efficiencies, maximising customer and company revenue. assist with office/site duties and any other ad-hoc tasks as required to ensure the smooth running of the project. represent the business, upholding our core values and behaviours with all internal and external customers, clients and third parties  maintain business and client confidentiality, adhering to applicable data protection regulations and information security standards in line with company, and group policies and procedures.   qualifications: skills and experience   ·         experience of working on bids, tenders and project delivery. ·         strong organisational and time management skills. ·         analytical abilities and problem-solving aptitude. ·         excellent communicator and customer focused approach. ·         a high attention to detail with excellent literacy and numeracy skills. ·         thrive in a busy environment. ·         ability to remain calm and professional under pressure to meet deadlines. ·         have excellent skills on crm (sales force) or similar operating systems, including microsoft 365 applications such as excel, word and powerpoint.   values & behaviours:   dpi values                                           dedication                precision                   integrity  behaviours   ·       inspiration -  has a clear vision of where to go and the ability to articulate it. empowers people to implement our vision and strategy. great communicator who captures the imagination, generating trust and commitment.   ·       team spirit -  thinks about "we" not "me"; we do this together. brings purpose to the team to make it a cohesive unit. knows when to seek help and when to give it. prepared to take action to address issues for the good of the team and celebrate others' successes.   ·       self-awareness -  emotionally intelligent; has empathy for others and gets the best out of people by meeting them on their terms. great at building rapport with colleagues and customers; knows that their behavior impacts on the performance of others and adapts approach to achieve the best results.  ·       achievement -  always striving to be the best and consistently delivers. high performer: bringing high energy, competence and making the right decisions to get things done.  ·       tenacity -  relentless in the pursuit of their goals. excellent at solving problems and overcoming obstacles; seeing the challenges before others see them and taking action, to avoid them becoming problems. sees setbacks as opportunities and becomes stronger in adversity.  ·       influence -  highly skilled at getting others committed to the goal. confident, enthusiastic and encourages creativity. understands the needs of stakeholders and as a result, engages them. our vision   ·      to compete at the highest standards in data centre fit-out, mep construction and managed services throughout europe and beyond.   our mission ·      continue to develop and deliver products and services unparalleled in terms of quality. ·      retain our clients, broaden our breadth of service identifying closely with their changing requirements. ·      execute a robust h&s and wellbeing strategy.  consider and implement wherever possible initiatives that relate to environmental improvements.   our strategy   ·       people -  build an organisation capable of managing the business we will become.  recruit and retain and develop the best industry professionals.  health, safety and wellbeing remain paramount, for our employees and clients. ·       products -  must address an industry need. we must have differentiators such as assured quality, modularisation, and off-site construction techniques. datalec’s commitment to quality is unsurpassed in the industry, we seek perfection.  new products and services must be delivered to the same exacting standards. ·       purpose -  relates both to our clients and our organisation. we need to understand both how to be able to confidently present our solutions and product strategy to the market. separately, we create a working environment that promotes and rewards employees fairly, actively supporting a culture of transparency and mutual respect.

description_text:
company description 
 
 
 about grab and our workplace 
 grab is southeast asia's leading superapp. from getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. in grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of technology and ai to deliver the mission of driving southeast asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility. 
 
 
 job description 
 
 
 get to know the team 
 grabmart is grab's on-demand daily essentials and grocery delivery service. we bring products from various stores to our customers' doorsteps. as part of grab's ecosystem, we focus on speed, convenience, and reliability for millions of customers across indonesia. 
 get to know the role 
 you will lead the end-to-end planning processes for grabmart indonesia. you will build statistical forecasting models to predict demand for product categories, manage inventory levels across our dark stores and partner network, and ensure supply availability while minimizing waste and operational costs. this role supports scaling grabmart in indonesia. 
 this role reports to the head of supply chain and will be fully onsite at our south quarter office in jakarta.   
 the critical tasks you will perform 
 
 you will build and maintain statistical forecasting models for product categories and regions within grabmart indonesia, incorporating market intelligence and promotional plans. 
 you will lead the sales and operations planning (s&op) process, facilitating alignment between commercial, marketing, and operations teams on demand and capacity plans. 
 you will translate demand forecasts into supply plans and purchase orders, working with sourcing teams to account for capacity constraints and lead times. 
 you will set inventory policies including safety stock levels and reorder points to maintain target service levels while minimizing carrying costs and obsolescence. 
 you will monitor inventory health across dark stores and warehouses, identifying stock-out risks and excess inventory situations for resolution. 
 you will analyze forecast accuracy metrics to identify root causes of variance and implement corrective actions to improve planning performance. 
 
 
 
 qualifications 
 
 
 what essential skills you will need 
 
 5+ years of experience in demand planning, supply planning, or inventory management within e-commerce, retail, or fmcg sectors. you will apply this background to manage grabmart indonesia's planning operations and stakeholder relationships. 
 experience building statistical forecasting models (such as time-series analysis, regression, or causal methods) for product categories. you will use these models to predict demand across geographies and product types. 
 experience facilitating sales and operations planning (s&op) processes with commercial and operations stakeholders. you will lead monthly planning cycles to align teams on consensus forecasts. 
 experience converting demand forecasts into supply plans and purchase orders within planning systems or erp platforms. you will create feasible plans that respect supplier capacity and lead time constraints. 
 experience calculating safety stock parameters and reorder points based on demand variability and service level targets. you will set these parameters to balance product availability against inventory carrying costs. 
 experience monitoring inventory health across multiple fulfillment nodes (such as warehouses or dark stores) to identify stock-out or excess risks. you will track inventory metrics to ensure operational readiness. 
 experience measuring forecast accuracy using metrics (such as mape, rmse, or bias) and implementing improvement actions. you will use these measurements to refine forecasting processes. 
 fluency in bahasa indonesia and english. you will use bahasa indonesia to coordinate with local store operations and suppliers in indonesia, and english to collaborate with regional supply chain teams and document planning processes. 
 bachelor's degree in supply chain management, engineering, statistics, or a related quantitative field. you will apply supply chain principles and analytical methods to build forecasting models and optimize inventory policies. 
 
 
 
 additional information 
 
 
 life at grab 
 we care about your well-being at grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer: 
 
 we have your back with  term life insurance  and comprehensive  medical insurance. 
 
 with  grabflex,  create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations. 
 celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through  parental  and  birthday leave , and give back to your communities through  love-all-serve-all (lasa)  volunteering leave 
 we have a confidential  grabber assistance programme  to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges. 
 balancing personal commitments and life's demands are made easier with our flexwork arrangements such as differentiated hours 
 
 what we stand for at grab 
 we are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that provides equal opportunity for grabbers to grow and perform at their best. we consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, race, religion, age, gender, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.

description_text: about us we’ve got an incredible brand -- now we’re busy creating the legend behind it.  at hosting.com, we’ve set out to redefine the new standard for what web hosting should be — one that is authentically human, deeply trusted, and built on shared success. our aim and promise is bold: to become the world’s most trusted hosting company. if you’re eager to contribute your time and talent to something bigger that people will talk about long after your work is done -- hosting.com is your place.  if you want to do that work with and alongside incredible humans who care about each other, our customers and the work we do -- it’s at hosting.com.  if you believe the best success is always shared success, with your teammates, for your customers -- hosting.com is your next work home. at hosting.com, we’re not just hosting websites. although we do a great job of that for millions of websites.  we’re helping our customers tell their stories and connect with their people. creating product experiences that helps them do that. being there when they need us. and earning trust, day by day, by showing up and giving our best. all because we care ... about each other’s success.  our team is 750+ strong and growing, spread across the globe. we can’t do this alone.  come join the journey. and help us build something better, together. about the role what you'll do in this role, you should be a keen problem solver and have a good level of written and spoken english. the role primarily involves helping clients and prospective clients use our hosting service, answering technical queries mainly through support tickets and live chat.  we use a standard hosting stack comprising cpanel, linux, apache, mysql, and php so experience with these technologies is crucial. the majority of the sites we host will run a cms like wordpress, so experience from a user or management perspective of wordpress is also desirable.  what you'll bring accessing a linux server with ssh  minimal d3/s1  1 year experience  using common command line tools, like grep, vi/nano, chmod/chown. htaccess files, rewrite rules, ip blocking  basic php scripting and syntax, php.ini configuration variables  mysql connection strings, basic sql syntax, and common error messages  identifying and diagnosing server performance problems (cpu, iowait, swap)  migrating websites manually between servers  managing dns and nameservers.  why you’ll love it here be part of a global, purpose-driven team building one of the world’s most trusted hosting companies. is a fast moving, agile company. we are energetic, and we hustle. you should be able to move at pace and be self-motivated. our values   be pragmatic. be trusted. be energetic. be accountable. be respectful. at hosting.com, success is always shared — with our people, our customers, and our communities.

description_text: merancang & membangun infrastruktur: mengonfigurasi server, jaringan, dan layanan penyimpanan berbasis cloud (cloud computing). migrasi sistem: memindahkan data dan aplikasi dari server lokal ( on-premise ) ke lingkungan cloud. pemeliharaan & optimasi: memantau kinerja cloud agar tetap berjalan lancar (maintenance) dan meningkatkan efisiensi biaya (cost optimization). keamanan cloud: menerapkan langkah-langkah keamanan (security) untuk melindungi data dan aplikasi dari ancaman siber. otomatisasi: mengembangkan skrip untuk mengotomatiskan tugas-tugas administratif dan operasional. troubleshooting: memecahkan masalah teknis (debugging) yang terjadi pada layanan cloud kualifikasi jabatan : gelar sarjana/diploma dalam bidang teknik informatika, sistem informasi, atau disiplin ilmu terkait . minimum 1-2 tahun pengalaman sebagai system administrator maupun magang di bidang dukungan teknis cloud, hosting atau infrastruktur it. memiliki pengetahuan mendalam tentang arsitektur layanan hosting dan cloud. memiliki pengalaman dalam membangun infrastruktur hosting dan cloud ⁠memiliki kemampuan troubleshooting yang kuat dan pemecahan masalah analitis. memiliki pemahaman yang baik tentang layanan dan solusi cloud utama, seperti amazon web services (aws), microsoft azure, atau google cloud platform menjadi nilai tambah. memahami linux dan windows server dan virtualization memahami konsep backup dan recovery memiliki sertifikat rhcsa nilai tambah
requirements: AWS, Amazon Web Services, Backup, Cloud Computing, Cloud Hosting, Cloud Platform, Cost Optimization, Debugging, Google Cloud, Google Cloud Platform, Linux, Maintenance, Microsoft Azure, On Premise, Recovery, Security, System Administrator, Troubleshooting, Virtualization, Web Services, Windows Server, Exp: 1-2 tahun

description_text: tasks & responsibilities: support s collaboration • provide first-level technical support to employees via phone, email, in-person or remotely. • troubleshoot and resolve hardware, software, and network issues in a timely manner. • install, configure, and maintain computer systems, software, and peripherals. • work closely with vendors, isps, and service providers to resolve technical issues and perform upgrades. • participate in it projects involving system migration, cybersecurity training, and infrastructure expansion. • collaborate with it team members to identify and implement improvements to it processes and systems. • provide training and guidance to users on it-related topics and best practices. server administration • manage, maintain, and support windows server environments (2016/2016/2022) and vm • perform administration of active directory, dns, dhcp, group policy, and dfs services. • support virtualization platforms including provisioning, resource optimization, and performance tuning. • implement and manage patching, backups and restore process. • monitor system health, uptime, and performance using enterprise monitoring tools. • familiar with m365 administration especially on entra, exchange, intune and sharepoint. network administration • configure, and maintain lan/wan infrastructure including switches, routers, firewalls, vpns, and wireless. • troubleshoot and resolve complex network issues related to routing, switching, vlans, and connectivity. • ensure network security through firewall rules, intrusion detection/prevention (ids/ips), and acl policies. • familiar with network devices from vendors such as huawei, fortinet, or hpe. • conduct network capacity planning, performance tuning, and regular audits. • familiar with network protocol and services such as dhcp, dns, vpn and routing protocols. qualifications bachelor’s degree in information technology, computer science, or any it related field. strong knowledge of windows operating systems, as well as common software applications. strong experience in microsoft ad, domain management, microsoft 365 (m365), and entra saas model. familiar with network protocols, hardware, and troubleshooting techniques. knowledge of cybersecurity and data protection regulations. excellent problem-solving and communication skills. ability to work independently and as part of a team minimum 5 years of working experience as it engineer ability to communicate effectively in english candidate with proficiency in mandarin and cantonese will be an added advantage good level of troubleshooting skill and ability to work independently

job_title: IT Infrastructure Engineer – Fund Transfer Company (Singapore)
description_text: key responsibilities: windows active directory (ad) management  – maintain and administer ad, including user provisioning, group policies, and security configurations. windows administration  – oversee windows server environments, patch management, and troubleshooting. advanced linux administration  – manage and optimize linux servers, automate system tasks, and ensure high availability. networking (vpn, routing, firewall)  – configure and troubleshoot site-to-site vpns, routing protocols, vlans, and network security policies. fortinet administration  – manage and maintain fortinet firewalls, implement security policies, and monitor firewall logs. cloud infrastructure (aws/oci)  – deploy and manage workloads on aws or oracle cloud infrastructure (oci), including networking, security, and automation. requirements: minimum 3-5 years of hands-on experience  in it infrastructure roles. strong expertise in windows server administration , including active directory, gpos, and security hardening. proficiency in linux administration  (rhel, ubuntu, or similar) with advanced scripting skills (bash, python, or ansible). solid networking knowledge , including vpn (ipsec, ssl), routing protocols, vlans, and firewall configurations. hands-on experience with fortinet firewalls  (fortigate) for security policy management and troubleshooting. experience with aws and/or oracle cloud infrastructure (oci)  for cloud networking, ec2/compute instances, and iam roles. strong analytical and problem-solving skills. ability to work independently and collaborate with cross-functional teams. ability to travel to singapore on a regular basis for projects preferred (good to have): experience with siem solutions, ids/ips, or security monitoring tools. knowledge of devops tools (docker, kubernetes). understanding of financial industry security requirements and best practices.

description_text: placement : the selected candidate will be placed at pt artajasa pembayaran elektronis, located in bsd, south tangerang. tentang artajasa pt artajasa pembayaran elektronis merupakan salah satu penyedia infrastruktur sistem pembayaran nasional terkemuka di indonesia. artajasa menghadirkan layanan switching dan transaksi elektronik yang aman, andal, dan beroperasi 24/7 untuk mendukung perbankan serta institusi keuangan di seluruh indonesia. dengan komitmen pada keandalan sistem dan keunggulan operasional, artajasa berperan penting dalam menjaga stabilitas ekosistem pembayaran digital nasional. tentang posisi kami mencari  it monitoring officer  yang bertanggung jawab untuk melakukan pemantauan sistem dan infrastruktur ti secara real-time guna memastikan seluruh layanan berjalan stabil, aman, dan sesuai sla. posisi ini berperan penting dalam mendeteksi potensi gangguan lebih awal serta melakukan eskalasi cepat untuk menjaga kontinuitas layanan operasional 24/7. tanggung jawab melakukan monitoring terhadap sistem aplikasi, server, jaringan, dan infrastruktur ti secara real-time. mengidentifikasi potensi gangguan, anomali, atau penurunan performa sistem. melakukan eskalasi insiden kepada tim terkait sesuai prosedur yang berlaku. mencatat dan mendokumentasikan setiap insiden serta tindakan penanganannya. memastikan pemantauan berjalan sesuai sla dan standar operasional. berkoordinasi dengan tim it, network, dan application support dalam proses penanganan gangguan. menyusun laporan monitoring dan insiden secara berkala. kualifikasi pendidikan minimal s1 di bidang teknologi informasi, sistem informasi, teknik komputer, atau bidang terkait. memiliki pengalaman di bidang it monitoring, noc, atau operasional ti menjadi nilai tambah; fresh graduate dipersilakan melamar. memahami dasar-dasar jaringan, server, dan aplikasi menjadi keunggulan. memiliki kemampuan analisis dan problem-solving yang baik. teliti, responsif, dan mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan. bersedia bekerja dalam sistem shift untuk mendukung operasional 24/7. memiliki integritas tinggi dan mampu menjaga kerahasiaan informasi perusahaan.

description_text: ringkasan pekerjaan: kami sedang mencari seorang  it staff  yang berdedikasi dan berorientasi pada detail untuk mengelola, memelihara, dan mengoptimalkan infrastruktur ti di lingkungan kerja kami. posisi ini bertanggung jawab untuk memberikan dukungan teknis langsung, merawat sistem perangkat keras dan perangkat lunak, mengelola jaringan serta ruang server, serta memberikan pelatihan dan bantuan teknis kepada pengguna internal. kandidat ideal akan memastikan stabilitas, keamanan, dan efisiensi sistem ti organisasi, sambil memberikan layanan yang responsif dan profesional. tanggung jawab utama: 1. manajemen perangkat keras melakukan instalasi, konfigurasi, pemeliharaan, dan perbaikan komputer, laptop, monitor, dan printer. memantau kinerja perangkat keras dan melakukan upgrade atau perbaikan yang diperlukan. menangani permintaan bantuan terkait perbaikan perangkat keras 2. administrasi jaringan mengelola dan memelihara infrastruktur jaringan, baik jaringan kabel maupun nirkabel (wi-fi). mendiagnosis dan menyelesaikan masalah koneksi internet dan jaringan. menyusun dan menerapkan pengaturan serta kebijakan keamanan jaringan. 3. pengelolaan server dan data melakukan instalasi, pemeliharaan, dan pemantauan server fisik atau virtual. menjamin keamanan server, termasuk proses backup dan pemulihan data secara berkala. mengoptimalkan kinerja server dan melakukan pembaruan sistem secara berkala. 4. manajemen perangkat lunak menginstal dan memberikan dukungan untuk perangkat lunak penting seperti microsoft office dan aplikasi lainnya. mengelola lisensi perangkat lunak, termasuk pembaruan dan kepatuhan terhadap kebijakan it. menjaga agar perangkat lunak yang digunakan sesuai dengan kebutuhan dan standar organisasi. 5. dukungan ti & pelatihan pengguna memberikan dukungan teknis tingkat pertama kepada staf terkait berbagai isu ti. mendokumentasikan dan menyelesaikan permintaan bantuan teknis dengan cepat dan efektif. memberikan pelatihan dan panduan dasar kepada pengguna untuk meningkatkan pemahaman dan keterampilan digital. melaksanakan tugas teknisi lainnya sesuai kebutuhan departemen general affairs dan arahan dari direktur. kualifikasi: pendidikan minimal smk atau s1 di bidang teknologi informasi, ilmu komputer, atau bidang terkait. pengalaman kerja minimal 2–3 tahun di bidang dukungan ti, administrasi sistem, atau pengelolaan infrastruktur ti. menguasai perangkat keras komputer, jaringan, sistem operasi windows, dan manajemen server. memahami prinsip-prinsip keamanan jaringan, sistem backup, dan manajemen lisensi. memiliki kemampuan analisis dan pemecahan masalah yang baik. komunikatif, proaktif, dan mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim. lingkungan kerja: penugasan dilakukan secara on-site (langsung di lokasi kerja). kemungkinan diperlukan kerja di luar jam kerja reguler (malam atau akhir pekan) untuk keperluan pemeliharaan sistem.
requirements: Backup, Digital, General, Ideal, Internet, Keras, Laptop, Microsoft Office, On Site, Printer, Server, Staff, Upgrade, Virtual, Wi Fi, Windows, Exp: 3 tahun

description_text: eiger adventure land sedang mencari kandidat yang berpotensi untuk mengisi posisi network engineer. posisi ini nantinya akan bertanggung jawab untuk merancang, mengimplementasikan, dan memelihara infrastruktur jaringan yang aman, handal, dan berkinerja tinggi guna mendukung kelancaran operasional perusahaan. peran ini memastikan seluruh sistem, aplikasi, dan layanan digital dapat terhubung secara stabil, efisien, serta terlindungi dari gangguan maupun ancaman jaringan, sehingga mendukung keberlangsungan dan efektivitas operasional bisnis. role summary: 1. desain & implementasi infrastruktur jaringan mendesain, mengonfigurasi, dan memelihara jaringan lan, wan, wifi, vpn, firewall, switching, dan routing. mengimplementasikan konfigurasi jaringan sesuai kebutuhan operasional dan standar keamanan. 2. monitoring & troubleshooting jaringan memantau performa jaringan dan mengidentifikasi potensi gangguan. melakukan troubleshooting terhadap latency, konektivitas, dan penurunan kinerja jaringan. 3. manajemen perangkat jaringan mengelola router, switch, firewall, load balancer, dan access point. melakukan patching, upgrade firmware, dan pemeliharaan perangkat jaringan. 4. keamanan jaringan mengimplementasikan kontrol keamanan jaringan seperti acl, vlan segmentation, firewall rules, ids/ips, dan network policies. melakukan evaluasi dan perbaikan konfigurasi keamanan jaringan secara berkala. 5. capacity planning & dokumentasi melakukan capacity planning berdasarkan analisis trafik jaringan. menyusun dan memelihara dokumentasi topologi serta konfigurasi jaringan. 6. dukungan proyek & integrasi jaringan mendukung kebutuhan proyek ict yang memerlukan integrasi atau konfigurasi jaringan baru. berkoordinasi dengan vendor dan isp terkait implementasi dan pemeliharaan jaringan. 7. incident response & continuous improvement menangani insiden jaringan kritikal dan memastikan pemulihan layanan berjalan optimal. melakukan root cause analysis serta tindak lanjut untuk mencegah insiden berulang. requirements: 1. education & experience pendidikan minimal s1 teknologi informasi / teknik informatika atau setara. pengalaman minimal 2–4 tahun sebagai network engineer atau posisi sejenis. 2. technical competency menguasai konsep dan implementasi lan, wan, routing, switching, dan vpn. berpengalaman dengan firewall, network security, dan monitoring tools. memahami tcp/ip, subnetting, dan network performance tuning. 3. personal & professional skills memiliki kemampuan analisis dan troubleshooting yang kuat. mampu menyusun dokumentasi teknis secara rapi dan sistematis. mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun kolaboratif dalam tim. about company eiger adventure land is an ecotourism resort blending natural beauty with engaging activities and thrilling adventures. built to international standards, it offers immersive, sustainable experiences that celebrate harmony between generations and nature. at eiger adventure land, we believe people are the heartbeat of our mission: “to inspire generations through meaningful experiences in nature.” as part of our vision “to be a blessing company in sustainable ecotourism development”, we are building a team that grows together while caring for nature.
requirements: Access Point, Activities, Blending, Capacity Planning, Continuous Improvement, Development, Digital, Education, Firewall Rules, Firmware, Harmony, Heartbeat, Ids/Ips, Incident Response, International, Ip Subnetting, Lan Wan, Latency, Load Balancer, Mission, Monitoring Tools, Natural, Network Engineer, Network Performance, Network Performance Tuning, Network Policies, Network Security, Offers, Patching, People, Performance Tuning, Root Cause, Root Cause Analysis, Router, Routing Switching, Standards, Switch, Tcp/Ip, To Be, Together, Troubleshooting, Upgrade, Vendor, Vision, Vlan Segmentation, Wan Routing, Wifi, Exp: 4 tahun

description_text: we’re looking for a proactive, detail-oriented, and tech-savvy professional to support our it executive in both technical and operational aspects and landscape maintenance, with a strong focus on maintaining and optimizing smart home systems at the executive’s property in bali.  responsibilities   oversee, maintain, and troubleshoot smart home systems, including cctv, lighting, hvac, smart locks, and audio/video devices.  oversee landscape and outdoor maintenance, ensuring gardens, lighting, and irrigation systems are well-kept and functional.  manage home and office network systems, ensuring stable and secure connectivity (wi-fi, routers, vpns, basic firewalls).  coordinate with smart home vendors, maintenance providers, and contractors for installations, repairs, and upgrades.  manage landscape and facility maintenance, ensuring the villa grounds remain clean, safe, and fully functional.  develop and maintain technical documentation of all configurations, devices, and systems for transparency and continuity.  create and maintain simple automation scripts to optimize daily technical or operational tasks.  handle administrative and logistical tasks such as communicating with local authorities, managing permissions, and liaising with neighbors when needed.  provide occasional driving support and assistance for villa residents, family members, or guests when required.  ensure a discreet, reliable, and proactive service to the it executive and household, maintaining high standards of confidentiality and integrity.  organizing and overseeing other maintainance related topics to the villas with 3rd party vendors: pools, sauna, jacuzzi, landscaping    requirements   minimum 4 years of professional experience managing technical systems for modern properties or facilities.  proven hands-on experience with smart home systems (home assistant, control4, knx, or similar) is a strong plus.  basic to intermediate understanding of networking (lan/wan, vpn, vlan, wi-fi optimization, firewall setup).  basic to intermediate experience in electrical installation and maintenance familiarity with scripting or automation would be helpful  strong organizational, problem-solving, and multitasking skills with the ability to work independently.  high integrity, confidentiality, and professionalism in managing sensitive systems and personal environments.  a well-organized, motivated, and dependable personality who enjoys a dynamic, hands-on

description_text: it website & digital systems lead murzal & partners (mnp) position overview: the it website & digital systems officer is responsible for managing, developing, optimizing, and ensuring the security and performance of the firm’s website, landing pages, tracking systems, digital forms, and automation tools used by murzal & partners. this position also plays an important role in supporting digital marketing needs, technical seo, campaign support, regular website maintenance, as well as the management of internal digital work platforms to ensure that all of the firm’s digital assets operate effectively, efficiently, securely, and professionally. main responsibilities: 1. website development & maintenance manage the development, improvement, and updating of the firm’s website. create and develop landing pages for campaign and marketing purposes. perform regular website maintenance, including troubleshooting and bug fixing. manage and ensure proper setup of domains and hosting. ensure that the website remains stable, responsive, user-friendly, and professionally maintained. 2. wordpress, plugin, & performance optimization conduct audits of active plugins from both security and performance perspectives. remove, replace, or adjust inefficient plugins. optimize cache plugins and overall website performance. implement defer and delay strategies for non-critical javascript. optimize render-blocking css. maintain optimal website loading speed across both desktop and mobile platforms. 3. image optimization optimize website images into more efficient formats such as webp. compress images based on website needs, particularly for hero images, banners, and key pages. resize images in accordance with layout requirements. implement lazy loading for below-the-fold images. ensure that website visuals remain high quality without compromising page performance. 4. tracking & analytics set up and manage tracking tools such as google analytics, meta/facebook pixel, and similar platforms. implement tag management systems such as google tag manager. set up conversion tracking, including form submissions and other key user actions. ensure that all tracking data is accurate and reliable for monitoring and campaign evaluation purposes. 5. technical seo optimize the website structure from a technical seo perspective, including urls, sitemap, robots.txt, and indexing. identify and resolve technical seo issues, such as crawl errors and indexing problems. ensure strong mobile responsiveness across the website. coordinate with the marketing team to support improvements in organic seo performance. 6. security & data protection ensure website security through the management of ssl, firewall protection, and other necessary security measures. safeguard and protect user, lead, and customer data collected through the website. conduct regular website and digital system backups. minimize risks relating to system disruption, data leakage, or technical failure. 7. form & lead management create and manage digital forms, including contact forms, lead forms, and campaign-related forms. integrate forms with databases or reporting tools such as google sheets or other relevant systems. set up automated email responses following form submissions. ensure proper validation, recording, and storage of lead data. 8. automation & tools set up marketing automation tools based on campaign or operational needs. build automated notification systems via email, whatsapp, or other relevant platforms where necessary. develop workflow automation across tools to improve efficiency. provide recommendations on tools or digital systems that may support the firm’s operations. 9. google workspace & microsoft teams administration understand and manage the use of google workspace for the firm’s operational needs, including email, google drive, google meet, google calendar, google docs, and google sheets. understand and manage microsoft teams for internal communication, coordination, meetings, and collaboration. provide technical support to internal teams regarding the use of google workspace and microsoft teams. assist with account setup, access control, permissions, and troubleshooting related to internal digital work platforms. ensure that internal collaboration platforms are used effectively, securely, and in support of team productivity. 10. campaign & digital support support the deployment and technical implementation of digital campaigns, including banners, pop-ups, and tracking urls. prepare url tracking structures, including utm parameters. assist in troubleshooting errors related to digital campaigns or landing pages. work closely with the marketing team to ensure campaigns run effectively from a technical perspective. 11. reporting & deliverables prepare before-and-after performance reports for website optimization work. monitor and report improvements in website performance, including loading speed, stability, and tracking effectiveness. support efforts to make the website more seo-friendly and more effective for digital advertising purposes. provide bug-fixing support during the post-optimization monitoring and maintenance period. qualifications: bachelor’s degree in information technology, information systems, computer science, or a related field. proven experience in website management, particularly wordpress. strong understanding of plugin management, website performance optimization, and technical seo. proficiency in google analytics, google tag manager, meta pixel, and other relevant tracking tools. understanding of website security, backup systems, and data protection principles. ability to create and manage landing pages, form integrations, and workflow automation. good understanding of google workspace and microsoft teams administration. strong analytical skills in evaluating website and campaign performance. detail-oriented, responsive, capable of troubleshooting, and able to work under targets and deadlines. familiarity with ui/ux basics, html, css, javascript, and marketing tool integrations will be considered an advantage. expected work output: the firm’s website operates quickly, securely, stably, and is properly maintained. campaign landing pages are effectively created and deployed. tracking and analytics systems function accurately. the website is better optimized for seo and digital marketing purposes. form systems, lead capture, and automation processes are organized and efficient. internal digital collaboration platforms function properly and support team coordination. regular reports on website performance and improvements are available.

description_text: deskripsi pekerjaan (job description): kami mencari individu yang proaktif dan memiliki visi teknis untuk bergabung sebagai it staff. peran ini sangat krusial karena anda tidak hanya menjaga operasional harian, tetapi juga menjadi penggerak utama (inisiator) dalam implementasi sistem erp yang sedang dikembangkan perusahaan. tanggung jawab utama: inisiasi & pengembangan erp: menjadi koordinator dalam merancang, menginisiasi, dan mengimplementasikan program erp baru (seperti odoo, sap, atau custom erp) agar sesuai dengan proses bisnis perusahaan. analisis sistem: melakukan pemetaan kebutuhan antar departemen (finance, warehouse, purchasing dll) untuk diintegrasikan ke dalam sistem erp. it helpdesk: menjadi titik kontak pertama (first line support) bagi seluruh staf kantor terkait kendala teknis software maupun hardware. troubleshooting: melakukan diagnosa dan perbaikan cepat ( troubleshooting ) pada masalah jaringan, server, database, serta perangkat komputer pendukung. maintenance: melakukan pemeliharaan rutin pada infrastruktur it guna memastikan seluruh sistem berjalan tanpa kendala ( zero downtime ). persyaratan (requirements): pendidikan minimal s1 teknik informatika, atau bidang terkait. pengalaman & pemahaman erp: memiliki pengalaman atau pemahaman mendalam mengenai struktur erp. diutamakan bagi yang pernah terlibat dalam proyek implementasi erp dari nol. skill teknis: menguasai manajemen database (sql server/postgresql/mysql) dan pemahaman dasar jaringan (mikrotik/lan/wan). problem solver: mampu berpikir logis dan cepat dalam mengatasi masalah teknis ( troubleshooting ) baik secara remote maupun onsite. komunikasi: memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik untuk memberikan pelatihan (training) kepada user/pengguna erp. sikap kerja: jujur, teliti, mandiri, dan memiliki inisiatif tinggi untuk mengembangkan sistem it perusahaan.
requirements: Custom ERP, Database, First Line, Hardware Troubleshooting, It Helpdesk, Lan/Wan, Maintenance, Mikrotik, Mysql, Odoo, Onsite, Postgresql, Postgresql/Mysql, Problem Solver, Purchasing, Remote, SAP, SQL Server, Software, Staff, Zero

description_text: we are a multinational chemical manufacturing company based in west java, indonesia, delivering high-quality chemical solutions for a wide range of industrial applications. our products serve both domestic and export markets, supported by strong commitments to safety, innovation, and sustainable manufacturing practices. as part of a global organization, we offer a professional and collaborative work environment that encourages continuous improvement, learning, and long-term career development. for  quality  area, we are seeking individuals to apply for the  grading & fiber analyst  position based in purwakarta, indonesia. your ideal profile: min. diploma 3 (science or chemical analyst) able to perform sample preparation and routine maintenance of fiber testing equipment. strong understanding of laboratory testing standards, quality protocols, and data accuracy requirements. familiarity with iso, qa/qc procedures, and good laboratory practices (glp). good analytical thinking, attention to detail and teamwork skills to support cross-functional laboratory activities. purpose of the job: the incumbent able to do a job related to fiber testing especially spinning fault, nonwovens contamination on fiber, commodifier, fiber length, fiber appearance test under uv light and sulphur content on fiber as per work instruction in effective, efficient and safe way. if you are interest with this position, please apply through the link provided. we will contact you for more detail.
